src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:  public componentDidCatch(error: Error, errorInfo: ErrorInfo) {

src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:    if (

src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:  }
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:  public render() {
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:    const state = (this as any).state as State;
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:    const props = (this as any).props as Props;
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:    if (state.hasError) {
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:      let errorMessage = "An unexpected error occurred.";
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:      try {
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:        const errorMsg = state.error?.message;
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:        if (errorMsg && typeof errorMsg === "string" && errorMsg.trim() !== "" && errorMsg !== "undefined" && errorMsg !== "null") {
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:          // Try to parse if it's a FirestoreErrorInfo JSON string
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:          if (errorMsg.includes('{') && errorMsg.includes('}')) {
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:            try {
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:              const parsed = JSON.parse(errorMsg);
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:              if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && parsed.error && parsed.operationType) {
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:                errorMessage = `Firestore ${parsed.operationType} error: ${parsed.error}`;
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:                if (parsed.error.includes('offline')) {
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:                  errorMessage = "The connection to the database was lost. Please check your internet connection.";
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:                }
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:              } else if (parsed && parsed.message) {
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:                errorMessage = parsed.message;
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:              }
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:            } catch (e) {
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:              // Not a JSON string, check if it's a regular error message
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:              errorMessage = errorMsg;
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:            }
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:          } else {
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:            errorMessage = errorMsg;
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:          }
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:        }
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:      } catch (e) {
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:        errorMessage = state.error?.message || errorMessage;
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:      }
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:
src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:      return (

src/lib/urduUtils.ts:export const translateToUrdu = (text: string | undefined): string => {
src/lib/urduUtils.ts:  if (!text) return '۔۔۔۔۔۔۔۔۔۔۔۔';
src/lib/urduUtils.ts:  let translated = text;
src/lib/urduUtils.ts:
src/lib/urduUtils.ts:  // Sort keys by length descending to handle longer terms first (e.g. 'raiwind city' before 'raiwind')
src/lib/urduUtils.ts:  const sortedKeys = Object.keys(urduTranslationMap).sort((a, b) => b.length - a.length);
src/lib/urduUtils.ts:
src/lib/urduUtils.ts:  sortedKeys.forEach(key => {
src/lib/urduUtils.ts:    // Use string replace instead of word boundary regex to handle mixed scripts better
src/lib/urduUtils.ts:    translated = translated.split(new RegExp(key.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&'), 'gi')).join(urduTranslationMap[key]);
src/lib/urduUtils.ts:  });
src/lib/urduUtils.ts:
src/lib/urduUtils.ts:  return translated;
src/lib/urduUtils.ts:};
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:export function safeStringify(obj: any, spaces?: number): string {
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:  if (obj === undefined) return "null";
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:  // We should NOT return the raw string if we want it to be valid JSON (it needs quotes)
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:  // unless we specifically know the caller doesn't want them. 
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:  // Given its usage in fetch bodies and localStorage, it should be valid JSON.
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:  
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:  const cache = new WeakSet();
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:  
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:  const replacer = (key: string, value: any) => {
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:    if (typeof value === "object" && value !== null) {
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:      // Check for circular reference first
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:      if (cache.has(value)) {
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:        return "[Circular]";
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:      }
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:      cache.add(value);
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:      // Handle common problematic objects that cause circular structure errors
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:      try {
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:        const constructorName = value.constructor ? value.constructor.name : null;
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:        
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:        if (
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:          (typeof HTMLElement !== 'undefined' && value instanceof HTMLElement) || 
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:          (typeof Node !== 'undefined' && value instanceof Node) || 
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:          (value && value.$$typeof) ||
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:          (constructorName && (
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:            constructorName === 'HTMLElement' || 
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:            constructorName === 'Node' ||
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:            constructorName === 'Y2' ||
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:            constructorName === 'Ka' ||
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:            constructorName === 'Window' ||
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:            constructorName === 'Document'
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:          ))
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:        ) {
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:          return `[Object: ${constructorName || 'Internal'}]`;
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:        }
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:        
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:        if (value instanceof Event) return "[Event]";
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:        if (constructorName === 'File' || constructorName === 'Blob') return `[${constructorName}]`;
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:      } catch (e) {
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:        return "[Unserializable]";
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:      }
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:    }
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:    return value;
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:  };
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:  try {
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:    return JSON.stringify(obj, replacer, spaces) || "null";
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:  } catch (error) {
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:    console.warn("safeStringify critical failure:", error);
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:    return "[Unserializable Object]";
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:  }
src/lib/safeStringify.ts:}

src/lib/gemini.ts:export async function translateToUrduAI(text: string) {
src/lib/gemini.ts:  try {
src/lib/gemini.ts:    const response = await fetch('/api/generate', {
src/lib/gemini.ts:      method: 'POST',
src/lib/gemini.ts:      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/lib/gemini.ts:      body: JSON.stringify({ prompt: `Translate or transliterate this English text to Urdu specifically for use in official legal/utility documents (FIR, Notice). 
src/lib/gemini.ts:        Rules:
src/lib/gemini.ts:        1. Return ONLY the Urdu text.
src/lib/gemini.ts:        2. NO English explanation.
src/lib/gemini.ts:        3. NO punctuation unless it's part of the translation.
src/lib/gemini.ts:        4. NO markdown bold or code blocks.
src/lib/gemini.ts:        5. Just the clean Urdu string.
src/lib/gemini.ts:
src/lib/gemini.ts:        Text: ${text}` })
src/lib/gemini.ts:    });
src/lib/gemini.ts:
src/lib/gemini.ts:    if (!response.ok) {
src/lib/gemini.ts:      throw new Error(`Server error: ${response.status}`);
src/lib/gemini.ts:    }
src/lib/gemini.ts:
src/lib/gemini.ts:    const data = await response.json();
src/lib/gemini.ts:    let translated = data.text.trim();
src/lib/gemini.ts:    // Cleanup common AI prefixing/formatting
src/lib/gemini.ts:    translated = translated.replace(/^(Urdu translation|Translation|Urdu|Urdu:):\s*/i, '');
src/lib/gemini.ts:    translated = translated.replace(/[`*]+/g, ''); // Remove code blocks and bold markers
src/lib/gemini.ts:    return translated;
src/lib/gemini.ts:  } catch (error: any) {
src/lib/gemini.ts:    console.error("Translation API Error:", error);
src/lib/gemini.ts:    return null;
src/lib/gemini.ts:  }

src/pages/Drive.tsx:  const formatFileSize = (bytes: number) => {
src/pages/Drive.tsx:    if (bytes === 0) return '0 Bytes';
src/pages/Drive.tsx:    const k = 1024;
src/pages/Drive.tsx:    const sizes = ['Bytes', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
src/pages/Drive.tsx:    const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));
src/pages/Drive.tsx:    return parseFloat((bytes / Math.pow(k, i)).toFixed(2)) + ' ' + sizes[i];
src/pages/Drive.tsx:  };

src/pages/Cases.tsx:    setIsDeleting(true);
src/pages/Cases.tsx:    const toastId = toast.loading('Moving case to trash...');
src/pages/Cases.tsx:    let originalCases: DetectionCase[] | null = null;
src/pages/Cases.tsx:    try {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      console.log('Initiating deletion for case ID:', id);
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      // Try to find case in local state first to make it fast and bypass getDoc cache/local state bugs
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      const localCase = cases.find(c => c.id === id);
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      let caseData: any = null;
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      if (localCase) {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        console.log('Found case data locally in state:', localCase);
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        // Exclude internal React client state id
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        const { id: _, ...rest } = localCase;
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        caseData = rest;
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        console.log('Case not found locally. Fetching from Firestore...');
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        const caseDoc = await getDoc(doc(db, 'cases', id));
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        if (caseDoc.exists()) {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:          caseData = caseDoc.data();
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        }
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      }
src/pages/Cases.tsx:
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      if (caseData) {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        // Save current state for potential rollback
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        originalCases = [...cases];
src/pages/Cases.tsx:
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        // Optimistic UI update - instantly remove from state to behave snappily and bypass any snapshot lag
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        setCases(prev => prev.filter(c => c.id !== id));
src/pages/Cases.tsx:
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        batch.set(doc(db, 'trash', id), {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:          ...caseData,
src/pages/Cases.tsx:          deletedAt: new Date().toISOString()
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        });
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        batch.delete(doc(db, 'cases', id));
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        try {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:          await batch.commit();
src/pages/Cases.tsx:          toast.success('Case moved to trash successfully', { id: toastId });
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        } catch (commitErr) {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:          // Revert optimistic updates
src/pages/Cases.tsx:          if (originalCases) setCases(originalCases);
src/pages/Cases.tsx:          throw commitErr;
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        }
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        toast.error(`Case not found (ID: ${id})`, { id: toastId });
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      }
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      setCaseToDelete(null);
src/pages/Cases.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      console.error('Delete case error:', err);
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      let friendlyMessage = 'Failed to delete case.';
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      if (err?.message?.includes('permission-denied') || err?.code === 'permission-denied') {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        friendlyMessage = 'Permission Denied: Only administrators or the creator of this case can delete it.';
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      } else if (err?.message) {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        friendlyMessage = err.message;
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      }
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      toast.error(friendlyMessage, { id: toastId, duration: 6000 });
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      try {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        handleFirestoreError(err, OperationType.DELETE, 'cases');
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      } catch (e) {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:        console.error('Logged Firestore error:', e);
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      }
src/pages/Cases.tsx:    } finally {
src/pages/Cases.tsx:      setIsDeleting(false);
src/pages/Cases.tsx:    }
src/pages/Cases.tsx:  };
src/pages/Cases.tsx:

src/pages/Login.tsx:import { auth } from '../firebase';
src/pages/Login.tsx:
src/pages/Login.tsx:export default function Login() {
src/pages/Login.tsx:  const [error, setError] = useState('');
src/pages/Login.tsx:  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
src/pages/Login.tsx:  const navigate = useNavigate();
src/pages/Login.tsx:
src/pages/Login.tsx:  const handleGithubLogin = async () => {
src/pages/Login.tsx:    setIsLoading(true);
src/pages/Login.tsx:    setError('');
src/pages/Login.tsx:    try {
src/pages/Login.tsx:      const provider = new GithubAuthProvider();
src/pages/Login.tsx:      await signInWithPopup(auth, provider);
src/pages/Login.tsx:      navigate('/');

src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:  const handleFetchBill = async (isStandalone = false) => {

src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:  const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(false);
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:  const handleDeleteCase = async (id: string) => {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:    setIsDeleting(true);
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:    const toastId = toast.loading('Moving case to trash...');
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:    let originalRecentCases: DetectionCase[] | null = null;
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:    let originalAllFilteredCases: DetectionCase[] | null = null;
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:    try {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      console.log('Initiating deletion for case ID:', id);
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      // Try to find case in local state first to make it fast and bypass getDoc cache/local state bugs
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      const localCase = recentCases.find(c => c.id === id);
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      let caseData: any = null;
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      if (localCase) {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        console.log('Found case data locally in state:', localCase);
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        // Exclude internal React client state id
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        const { id: _, ...rest } = localCase;
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        caseData = rest;
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        console.log('Case not found locally. Fetching from Firestore...');
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        const caseDoc = await getDoc(doc(db, 'cases', id));
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        if (caseDoc.exists()) {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:          caseData = caseDoc.data();
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        }
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      }
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      if (caseData) {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        // Save current states for potential rollback
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        originalRecentCases = [...recentCases];
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        originalAllFilteredCases = [...allFilteredCases];
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        // Optimistic UI updates - remove immediately from lists to make changes instantaneous on screen
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        setRecentCases(prev => prev.filter(c => c.id !== id));
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        setAllFilteredCases(prev => prev.filter(c => c.id !== id));
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        batch.set(doc(db, 'trash', id), {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:          ...caseData,
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:          deletedAt: new Date().toISOString()
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        });
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        batch.delete(doc(db, 'cases', id));
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        try {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:          await batch.commit();
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:          toast.success('Case moved to trash successfully', { id: toastId });
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        } catch (commitErr) {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:          // Revert optimistic updates
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:          if (originalRecentCases) setRecentCases(originalRecentCases);
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:          if (originalAllFilteredCases) setAllFilteredCases(originalAllFilteredCases);
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:          throw commitErr;
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        }
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        toast.error(`Case not found (ID: ${id})`, { id: toastId });
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      }
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      setCaseToDelete(null);
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      console.error('Delete case error:', err);
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      let friendlyMessage = 'Failed to delete case.';
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      if (err?.message?.includes('permission-denied') || err?.code === 'permission-denied') {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        friendlyMessage = 'Permission Denied: Only administrators or the creator of this case can delete it.';
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      } else if (err?.message) {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        friendlyMessage = err.message;
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      }
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      setError(friendlyMessage);
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      toast.error(friendlyMessage, { id: toastId, duration: 6000 });
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      try {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        handleFirestoreError(err, OperationType.DELETE, 'cases');
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      } catch (e) {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:        console.error('Logged Firestore error:', e);
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      }
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:    } finally {
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:      setIsDeleting(false);
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:    }
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:  };
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:  return (

src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:                                const diff = present - previous;
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:                                return !isNaN(present) && !isNaN(previous) ? (diff <= 0 ? '' : diff.toString()) : '';
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:                              }
src/pages/Dashboard.tsx:                            },

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    try {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(key);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      if (!saved || saved === 'undefined' || saved === 'null') return defaultValue;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      const trimmed = saved.trim();
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      if (trimmed === 'undefined' || trimmed === 'null' || trimmed === '') return defaultValue;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      try {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        return JSON.parse(trimmed) as T;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      } catch (err) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        console.warn(`JSON parse error for key "${key}":`, err);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        return defaultValue;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      return defaultValue;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  };

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      case 'presentReadingAtSite':

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  if (showReadingMismatch) setShowReadingMismatch(false);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                }}
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                onBlur={(e) => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  const val = e.target.value;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  if (val.trim() === '') return;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  if (billData?.presentReading && !isReadingVerified) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    const presentReadingAtSiteNum = parseInt(val.replace(/,/g, '') || '0');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    const presReadingOnBillNum = parseInt(billData.presentReading.toString().replace(/,/g, '') || '0');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    if (!isNaN(presentReadingAtSiteNum) && !isNaN(presReadingOnBillNum)) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                      if (presentReadingAtSiteNum < presReadingOnBillNum) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                        playWarningSound();
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                        setReadingMismatchType('REVERSED');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                        setShowReadingMismatch(true);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                      } else {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                        let maxAllowedUnits = 300;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                        if (billData.monthWiseUnits && billData.monthWiseUnits.length > 0) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                          const unitsArr = billData.monthWiseUnits
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                            .map(m => parseInt(m.units?.toString().replace(/,/g, '') || '0'))
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                            .filter(u => !isNaN(u));
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                          
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                          if (unitsArr.length > 0) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                            const sum = unitsArr.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                            const avg = sum / 12;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                            const highest = Math.max(...unitsArr);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                            maxAllowedUnits = Math.max(avg, highest);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                          }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                        }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                        if (presentReadingAtSiteNum > presReadingOnBillNum + maxAllowedUnits) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                          playWarningSound();
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                          setReadingMismatchType('PENDING');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                          setShowReadingMismatch(true);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                        } else {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                          setShowReadingMismatch(false);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                          setReadingMismatchType(null);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                        }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                      }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  } else {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    setShowReadingMismatch(false);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    setReadingMismatchType(null);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                }}
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                placeholder="Enter Present Reading at Site"
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                disabled={isDisabled}
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                className="w-full bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border border-neutral-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 text-neutral-900 dark:text-slate-100 font-bold focus:outline-none focus:border-indigo-500"
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:              />
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:            </div>

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  const isMonthAvailableInBill = (monthStr: string) => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    if (!monthStr || !billData) return true;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    const date = new Date(monthStr);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    if (isNaN(date.getTime())) return true;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    const monthNames = ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun", "Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec"];
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    const monthName = monthNames[date.getMonth()].toUpperCase();
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    const year = date.getFullYear();
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    const shortYear = (year % 100).toString().padStart(2, '0');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    // Check billing month
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    if (billData.billingMonth) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      const parts = billData.billingMonth.toUpperCase().split(/[- ]+/).filter(Boolean);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      if (parts[0]?.startsWith(monthName) && (parts[1] === year.toString() || parts[1] === shortYear)) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        return true;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    // Check monthWiseUnits
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    if (billData.monthWiseUnits) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      return billData.monthWiseUnits.some(u => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        const parts = u.month.toUpperCase().split(/[- ]+/).filter(Boolean);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        return parts[0]?.startsWith(monthName) && (parts[1] === year.toString() || parts[1] === shortYear);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      });
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    return false;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  };
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      localStorage.setItem('lesco_bill_data', safeStringify(billData));
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    }, 1000);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  }, [billData]);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    const timer = setTimeout(() => {

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    }, 1000);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  }, [detectionData]);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  const isSlownessActive = detectionData.discrepancy.includes('Meter Slow By');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    const totalWatts = (detectionData.loadItems || []).reduce((sum, item) => sum + (parseFloat(item.total.toString()) || 0), 0);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    const totalKW = (totalWatts / 1000).toFixed(3) + ' kW';
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    if (detectionData.connectedLoad !== totalKW) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      setDetectionData(prev => ({ ...prev, connectedLoad: totalKW }));
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  }, [detectionData.loadItems]);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    // Skip load-based calculation if "Meter Slow By" is active
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    if (detectionData.discrepancy.includes('Meter Slow By')) return;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    const loadKW = parseFloat(detectionData.connectedLoad.replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || 0;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    let loadFactor = 0;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    if (detectionData.loadFactor.includes('%')) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      loadFactor = parseFloat(detectionData.loadFactor.replace('%', '')) / 100;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    } else {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      loadFactor = parseFloat(detectionData.loadFactor) || 0;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    const months = parseFloat(detectionData.detectionPeriodMonths) || 0;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    const assessed = Math.round(loadKW * loadFactor * 730 * months);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    if (detectionData.unitsAssessed !== assessed.toString() && (loadKW > 0 || loadFactor > 0 || months > 0 || assessed === 0)) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      setDetectionData(prev => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        const loadRemark = 'Detection Bill charged as Per Connected Load';
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        let lines = prev.remarks ? prev.remarks.split('\n').map(l => l.replace(/^\d+-\s*/, '').trim()).filter(Boolean) : [];
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        const hasLoad = lines.some(l => l.toLowerCase().includes('detection bill charged as per connected load'));
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        if (assessed > 0 && !hasLoad) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          lines.unshift(loadRemark);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        } else if (hasLoad) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          const loadIdx = lines.findIndex(l => l.toLowerCase().includes('detection bill charged as per connected load'));
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          if (loadIdx > 0) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:            const loadLine = lines.splice(loadIdx, 1)[0];
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:            lines.unshift(loadLine);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        const finalRemarks = lines.length > 1 ? lines.map((l, i) => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          let line = l;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          if (line.toLowerCase().includes('detection bill charged as per connected load') && !line.endsWith('.')) line += '.';
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:           return `${i + 1}-${line}`;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        }).join('\n') : lines[0] || '';
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        return { 
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          ...prev, 
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          unitsAssessed: assessed > 0 ? assessed.toString() : '',
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          remarks: finalRemarks
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        };
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      });
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  }, [detectionData.connectedLoad, detectionData.loadFactor, detectionData.detectionPeriodMonths, detectionData.discrepancy]);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    if (showMeterMismatch && billData?.meterNoOnBill === detectionData.meterNumber) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      setShowMeterMismatch(false);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  }, [billData?.meterNoOnBill, detectionData.meterNumber, showMeterMismatch]);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  React.useEffect(() => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    if (detectionData.detectionPeriodFrom && detectionData.detectionPeriodTo) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      const from = new Date(detectionData.detectionPeriodFrom);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      const to = new Date(detectionData.detectionPeriodTo);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      if (!isNaN(from.getTime()) && !isNaN(to.getTime())) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        const diffMonths = (to.getFullYear() - from.getFullYear()) * 12 + (to.getMonth() - from.getMonth()) + 1;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        if (diffMonths > 0) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          setDetectionData(prev => ({ ...prev, detectionPeriodMonths: diffMonths.toString() }));
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  }, [detectionData.detectionPeriodFrom, detectionData.detectionPeriodTo]);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  React.useEffect(() => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    if (isSlownessActive) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      setDetectionData(prev => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        const slowness = prev.meterSlowBy || '';

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                subDivisionName: data.subDivisionName || "",
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                feederName: data.feederName || "",
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                meterStatus: data.meterStatus || "",
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                customerId: data.customerId || "",
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                tariff: data.tariff || "",
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                currentBill: parseFloat(data.currentBill?.toString().replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || 0,
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                deferredAmount: parseFloat(data.deferredAmount?.toString().replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || 0,
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                presentReading: data.presentReading || "",
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                previousReading: data.previousReading || "",
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                difference: (() => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  if (data.consumedUnits && data.consumedUnits !== "N/A") {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    return data.consumedUnits.toString().replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  const present = parseInt(data.presentReading?.toString().replace(/[^0-9]/g, '') || '0');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  const previous = parseInt(data.previousReading?.toString().replace(/[^0-9]/g, '') || '0');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  const diff = present - previous;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  return !isNaN(present) && !isNaN(previous) ? (diff <= 0 ? '' : diff.toString()) : '';
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                })(),
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                monthWiseUnitsConsumed: "",
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                monthWiseUnits: data.monthWiseUnits?.map((item: any) => {

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    const str = val?.toString()?.trim() || '';
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    return str.toUpperCase() === 'N/A' ? '' : str;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  };
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  return {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    month: cleanValue(item.month),
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    reading: cleanValue(item.reading),
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    units: cleanValue(item.units),
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    bill: cleanValue(item.bill),
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    adj: cleanValue(item.adj),
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    payment: cleanValue(item.payment),
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                  };
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                }) || [],
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:              });
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:              setDetectionData(prev => ({
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                ...prev,
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                meterStatus: data.meterStatus || "",
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                feederName: data.feederName || "",
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                meterNumber: data.meterNoOnBill || "",

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                address: data.address || "",

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:              setStep(3);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:            } else {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:              setError('Could not extract data from the image. Please try a clearer photo or manual entry.');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:            }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          } catch (err: any) {

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:            setError(err.message || "Failed to scan image.");
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          } finally {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:            setIsScanning(false);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        } else {

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          stopCamera();
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      }

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  const processFile = (file: File) => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    setError('');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    const reader = new FileReader();
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    reader.onerror = () => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      setError('Failed to read the selected file. Please try again.');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    };
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    reader.onload = (event) => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      const img = new Image();
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      img.onerror = () => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        setError('The selected file is not a valid image. Please try another one.');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      };
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      img.onload = () => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        try {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          const MAX_WIDTH = 800;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          const MAX_HEIGHT = 800;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          let width = img.width;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          let height = img.height;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          if (width > height) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:            if (width > MAX_WIDTH) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:              height *= MAX_WIDTH / width;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:              width = MAX_WIDTH;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:            }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          } else {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:            if (height > MAX_HEIGHT) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:              width *= MAX_HEIGHT / height;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:              height = MAX_HEIGHT;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:            }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          canvas.width = width;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          canvas.height = height;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          if (!ctx) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:            setError('Failed to process the image. Please try again.');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:            return;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          setPhoto(canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.6));
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          setStep(2);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        } catch (err) {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          console.error("Image processing error:", err);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:          setError('An error occurred while processing the image.');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        }
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      };
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      img.src = event.target?.result as string;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    };
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:  };

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      const window = parseInt(detectionData.windowAcCount || '0');

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      if (window > 0) return 'Window';
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:      return detectionData.acType || '';

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:        const split = parseInt(detectionData.splitAcCount || '0');

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                      {(() => {
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                         const presVal = billData.presentReading?.toString().toUpperCase() || '';
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                         const prevVal = billData.previousReading?.toString().toUpperCase() || '';
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                         if (presVal.includes('DF') || prevVal.includes('DF')) return 'DF';
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                         if (presVal.includes('EX') || prevVal.includes('EX')) return 'EX';
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                         if (presVal.includes('MC') || prevVal.includes('MC')) return 'MC';
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                         
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                         const present = parseInt(presVal.replace(/,/g, '') || '0');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                         const previous = parseInt(prevVal.replace(/,/g, '') || '0');
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                         const diff = present - previous;
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                         return !isNaN(present) && !isNaN(previous) ? (diff <= 0 ? '' : diff.toString()) : '';
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                       })()}
src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                    </div>

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                          });

src/pages/NewCase.tsx:                        className="text-[10px] bg-neutral-100 dark:bg-slate-800 hover:bg-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 text-neutral-600 dark:text-slate-300 px-2 py-1 rounded font-bold transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'feederReadings'), {

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:  const filteredReadings = readings.filter(r => r.feederName === currentFeederName);

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:  const lastDayOfLastMonth = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), 0);

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:  
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:  const allDates = Array.from({ length: daysInCurrentMonth + 1 }, (_, i) => {

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:    d.setDate(d.getDate() + i);

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:    const readingValue = r?.reading || 0;

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:    if (index === 0) {

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:    
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:    let progressive = 0;
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:    let tentative = 0;
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:    if (index === 1) {
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      progressive = perDay;
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      tentative = perDay * daysInCurrentMonth;
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:    } else {

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      progressive = prevProgressive + perDay;

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:    }
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:    acc.push({ ...dateObj, reading: readingValue, perDay, progressive, tentative, r });
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:    return acc;

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:              const progressiveLastMonth = r?.progressiveLastMonth || 0;

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:              const formattedIncDecMonth = `${diffLastMonth >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${incDecLastMonth}%`;
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:

src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:function TableRow({ data, r, perDay, progressive, tentative, progressiveLastYear, diffLastYear, formattedIncDec, progressiveLastMonth, diffLastMonth, formattedIncDecMonth, editingId, tempReading, setTempReading, tempTentative, setTempTentative, saveReading, startEdit, aiTentatives, setAiTentatives, calculateAITentative }: any) {
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:  return (
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:    <tr className="border-b">
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      <td className="p-4">{data.dateStr}</td>
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      <td className="p-4">
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:        {editingId === data.dateStr ? (
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:          <input 
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:            type="number" 
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:            value={isNaN(tempReading) ? '' : tempReading} 
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:            onChange={(e) => setTempReading(parseFloat(e.target.value))}
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:            className="border p-1 rounded w-24"
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:          />
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:        ) : (
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:          r ? (isNaN(r.reading) ? 0 : r.reading) : '-'
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:        )}
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      </td>
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      <td className="p-4">{perDay.toFixed(2)}</td>
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      <td className="p-4">{isNaN(progressive) ? 0 : progressive.toFixed(2)}</td>
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      <td className="p-4">
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:        {editingId === data.dateStr ? (
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:          <input 
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:            type="text" 
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:            value={tempTentative || ''}
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:            onChange={(e) => setTempTentative(e.target.value)}
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:            className="border p-1 rounded w-24" 
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:            placeholder="Tentative" 
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:          />
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:        ) : (
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:          tentative.toFixed(2)
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:        )}
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      </td>
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      <td className="p-4">{progressiveLastYear}</td>
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      <td className="p-4">{diffLastYear.toFixed(2)}</td>
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      <td className="p-4">{formattedIncDec}</td>
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      <td className="p-4">{progressiveLastMonth}</td>
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      <td className="p-4">{diffLastMonth.toFixed(2)}</td>
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      <td className="p-4">{formattedIncDecMonth}</td>
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:      <td className="p-4">
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:        {aiTentatives[data.dateStr] ? (
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:          aiTentatives[data.dateStr]
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:        ) : (
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:          <button 
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:            onClick={() => {
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:              setAiTentatives(prev => ({ ...prev, [data.dateStr]: 'Calculating...' }));
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:              calculateAITentative(data.dateStr, progressive, progressiveLastYear, progressiveLastMonth, tentative)
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:                .then(val => setAiTentatives(prev => ({ ...prev, [data.dateStr]: val })))
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:                .catch(() => setAiTentatives(prev => ({ ...prev, [data.dateStr]: 'Error' })));
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:            }}
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:            className="bg-purple-600 text-white px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs"
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:          >
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:            Calculate
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:          </button>
src/pages/FeederMonitoring.tsx:        )}

src/pages/Trash.tsx:

src/pages/Trash.tsx:    // Query directly from the trash collection where cases are actually stored on deletion
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    const q = query(collection(db, 'trash'));
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      let cases = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as DetectionCase));
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      const isUserAdmin = user?.email?.toLowerCase() === 'mianfiazullah@gmail.com' || user?.role === 'admin';
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      if (!isUserAdmin) {

src/pages/Trash.tsx:          const caseSub = (c.billData?.subDivisionName || '').trim().toLowerCase();
src/pages/Trash.tsx:          return userSub ? (caseSub === userSub) : (c.userId === user?.uid);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        });
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      }
src/pages/Trash.tsx:
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      setDeletedCases(cases);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    }, (error) => {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.LIST, 'trash');
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    });
src/pages/Trash.tsx:
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    return () => unsubscribe();
src/pages/Trash.tsx:  }, [user]);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:
src/pages/Trash.tsx:  const restoreCase = async (id: string) => {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    setIsRestoring(id);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    try {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      const trashDoc = await getDoc(doc(db, 'trash', id));
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      if (trashDoc.exists()) {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        const caseData = trashDoc.data();
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        const { deletedAt, ...restOfCaseData } = caseData as any;
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        // Optimistically remove from deleted list
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        setDeletedCases(prev => prev.filter(c => c.id !== id));
src/pages/Trash.tsx:
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        batch.set(doc(db, 'cases', id), {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:          ...restOfCaseData,
src/pages/Trash.tsx:          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        });
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        batch.delete(doc(db, 'trash', id));
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        await batch.commit();
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        toast.success('Case restored successfully');
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        toast.error('Case not found in trash');
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      }
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    } catch (error: any) {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.WRITE, 'cases');
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      toast.error('Failed to restore case');
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    } finally {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      setIsRestoring(null);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    }
src/pages/Trash.tsx:  };
src/pages/Trash.tsx:
src/pages/Trash.tsx:  const permanentlyDelete = async (id: string) => {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    setIsDeleting(true);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    // Optimistically remove from deleted list
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    setDeletedCases(prev => prev.filter(c => c.id !== id));
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    try {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'trash', id));
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      toast.success('Case permanently deleted');
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      setCaseToPermanentlyDelete(null);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    } catch (error: any) {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.DELETE, 'trash');
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      toast.error('Failed to delete case');
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    } finally {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      setIsDeleting(false);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    }
src/pages/Trash.tsx:  };
src/pages/Trash.tsx:
src/pages/Trash.tsx:  const deleteAllTrash = async () => {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    setIsDeletingAll(true);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    const toastId = toast.loading('Emptying trash...');
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    try {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      // Create a batch
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      deletedCases.forEach(item => {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        if (item.id) {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:          batch.delete(doc(db, 'trash', item.id));
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        }
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      });
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      await batch.commit();
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      toast.success('Trash emptied successfully', { id: toastId });
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      setShowDeleteAllConfirm(false);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      setDeletedCases([]);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    } catch (error: any) {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.DELETE, 'trash');
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      toast.error('Failed to empty trash', { id: toastId });
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    } finally {
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      setIsDeletingAll(false);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    }
src/pages/Trash.tsx:  };
src/pages/Trash.tsx:
src/pages/Trash.tsx:  const filteredCases = deletedCases.filter(c => {

src/pages/Trash.tsx:    const referenceNumber = c.referenceNumber || c.billData?.referenceNumber || '';
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    return consumerName.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
src/pages/Trash.tsx:           referenceNumber.includes(searchQuery);
src/pages/Trash.tsx:  });
src/pages/Trash.tsx:
src/pages/Trash.tsx:  return (
src/pages/Trash.tsx:    <div className="space-y-8">
src/pages/Trash.tsx:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4">
src/pages/Trash.tsx:        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
src/pages/Trash.tsx:          <button 
src/pages/Trash.tsx:            onClick={() => navigate(-1)}

src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    try {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(key);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      if (!saved || saved === 'undefined' || saved === 'null') return defaultValue;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      const trimmed = saved.trim();
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      if (trimmed === 'undefined' || trimmed === 'null' || trimmed === '') return defaultValue;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      try {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        return JSON.parse(trimmed);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      } catch (err) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        console.warn(`QuickEdit parse error for key "${key}":`, err);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        return defaultValue;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      return defaultValue;

src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:  const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear();

src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:  const acMin = `${currentYear}-04`;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:  const acMax = `${currentYear}-09`;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:  const acMaxEffective = thisMonth < acMax ? thisMonth : acMax;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:  const handleInputChange = (field: keyof (DetectionCase & { referenceNumber: string }), value: any) => {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    const newData = { ...data, [field]: value };
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    const isSlownessActive = newData.discrepancy?.includes('Meter Slow By');
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    const isAcField = ['noOfAC', 'splitAcCount', 'windowAcCount', 'acType', 'othersAcType', 'acPeriodFrom', 'acPeriodTo', 'acPeriodMonths', 'unitsOfAcPeriod'].includes(field);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    if (isSlownessActive && isAcField) return;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    if (field === 'acPeriodFrom' || field === 'acPeriodTo') {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      if (value) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        const month = parseInt(value.split('-')[1]);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        if (month < 4 || month > 9) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          toast.error('AC Period must be between April and September');
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          return;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        if (field === 'acPeriodTo' && value > thisMonth) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          toast.error('AC Period To cannot be later than the current month');
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          return;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      if (newData.acPeriodFrom && newData.acPeriodTo) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        const [y1, m1] = newData.acPeriodFrom.split('-').map(Number);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        const [y2, m2] = newData.acPeriodTo.split('-').map(Number);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        const months = (y2 * 12 + m2) - (y1 * 12 + m1) + 1;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        newData.acPeriodMonths = months > 0 ? months.toString() : '0';
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        newData.acPeriodMonths = '';
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    if (field === 'unitsAssessed' || field === 'unitsAlreadyCharged' || field === 'meterSlowBy' || field === 'discrepancy') {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      let assessed = parseInt(newData.unitsAssessed?.toString() || '0') || 0;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      const charged = parseInt(newData.unitsAlreadyCharged?.toString() || '0') || 0;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      let remark = newData.remarks || '';
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      if (newData.discrepancy?.includes('Meter Slow By') && newData.meterSlowBy) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        const slownessVal = parseInt(newData.meterSlowBy.replace('%', '')) || 0;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        if (slownessVal > 0 && slownessVal < 100 && charged > 0) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          assessed = Math.round((charged * 100) / (100 - slownessVal));
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          newData.unitsAssessed = assessed.toString();
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        // Simplified remark as requested: Detection Bill charged As per Slowness....%
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        remark = `Detection Bill charged As per Slowness ${newData.meterSlowBy}`;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      } else if (!newData.discrepancy?.includes('Meter Slow By')) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        const loadRemark = 'Detection Bill charged as Per Connected Load';
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        let lines = remark.split('\n').map(l => l.replace(/^\d+-\s*/, '').trim()).filter(Boolean);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        const hasLoad = lines.some(l => l.toLowerCase().includes('detection bill charged as per connected load'));
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        if (assessed > 0 && !hasLoad) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          lines.unshift(loadRemark);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        } else if (hasLoad) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          const loadIdx = lines.findIndex(l => l.toLowerCase().includes('detection bill charged as per connected load'));
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          if (loadIdx > 0) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:            const loadLine = lines.splice(loadIdx, 1)[0];
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:            lines.unshift(loadLine);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        remark = lines.length > 1 ? lines.map((l, i) => {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          let line = l;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          if (line.toLowerCase().includes('detection bill charged as per connected load') && !line.endsWith('.')) line += '.';
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:           return `${i + 1}-${line}`;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        }).join('\n') : lines[0] || '';
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      newData.remarks = remark;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      const net = assessed - charged;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      newData.netUnitsToBeCharged = net < 0 ? 'D.BILL IS NOT JUSTIFIED AS PER CONNECTED LOAD' : net.toString();
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    setData(newData);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    setIsSaved(false);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:  };
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:  const isMonthAvailableInBill = (monthStr: string) => {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    if (!monthStr || !data.billData) return true;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    const date = new Date(monthStr);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    if (isNaN(date.getTime())) return true;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    const monthNames = ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun", "Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec"];
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    const monthName = monthNames[date.getMonth()].toUpperCase();
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    const year = date.getFullYear();
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    const shortYear = (year % 100).toString().padStart(2, '0');
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    // Check billing month
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    if (data.billData.billingMonth) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      const parts = data.billData.billingMonth.toUpperCase().split(/[- ]+/).filter(Boolean);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      if (parts[0]?.startsWith(monthName) && (parts[1] === year.toString() || parts[1] === shortYear)) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        return true;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    // Check monthWiseUnits
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    if (data.billData.monthWiseUnits) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      return data.billData.monthWiseUnits.some(u => {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        const parts = u.month.toUpperCase().split(/[- ]+/).filter(Boolean);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        return parts[0]?.startsWith(monthName) && (parts[1] === year.toString() || parts[1] === shortYear);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      });
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    return false;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:  };

src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:  const handleFileSelect = async (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {

src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    if (!file) return;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    setIsExtracting(true);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    const loadingToast = toast.loading('Reading bill with AI...');
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    const reader = new FileReader();
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    reader.onerror = () => {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      toast.dismiss(loadingToast);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      toast.error('Failed to read file');
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      setIsExtracting(false);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    };
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    reader.onload = (event) => {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      const img = new Image();
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      img.onerror = () => {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        toast.dismiss(loadingToast);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        toast.error('Failed to load image');
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        setIsExtracting(false);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      };
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      img.onload = async () => {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        try {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          const MAX_WIDTH = 1600;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          const MAX_HEIGHT = 1600;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          let width = img.width;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          let height = img.height;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          if (width > height) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:            if (width > MAX_WIDTH) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:              height *= MAX_WIDTH / width;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:              width = MAX_WIDTH;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:            }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          } else {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:            if (height > MAX_HEIGHT) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:              width *= MAX_HEIGHT / height;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:              height = MAX_HEIGHT;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:            }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          }
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          canvas.width = width;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          canvas.height = height;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          if (!ctx) throw new Error("Could not initialize canvas");
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          const resizedBase64 = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.8);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          const extractedData = await extractBillData(resizedBase64);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          const scannedRef = extractedData.referenceNumber || "";
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          const subDiv = user?.subDivision || "";
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          const userEmail = user?.email?.toLowerCase() || "";
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          const isAdmin = userEmail === 'mianfiazullah@gmail.com' || user?.role === 'admin';
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          const isMasterFile = subDiv?.toLowerCase() === 'master file';
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          const hasBypass = isAdmin || isMasterFile;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          if (subDiv && !hasBypass) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:            const cleanRef = scannedRef.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:            const cleanSub = subDiv.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:            const isMatch = cleanSub ? cleanRef.includes(cleanSub) : scannedRef.toLowerCase().includes(subDiv.toLowerCase());
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:            
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:            if (!isMatch) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:              toast.dismiss(loadingToast);

src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:function InputField({ label, value, onChange, type = "text", readOnly = false, min, max, className }: { label: string, value: any, onChange: (v: string) => void, type?: string, readOnly?: boolean, min?: string, max?: string, className?: string }) {
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:  const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:  const thisMonth = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 7);
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:  const defaultMax = type === 'date' ? today : type === 'month' ? thisMonth : undefined;
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:  return (
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    <div className="space-y-1">
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-black uppercase tracking-wider ml-1">{label}</label>
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      {type === 'date' ? (
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        <CustomDatePicker
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          selected={value}
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          onChange={onChange}
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          maxDate={max ? new Date(max) : new Date()}
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          disabled={readOnly}
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          className={cn("font-bold text-black", className)}
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        />
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      ) : (
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        <input
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          type={type}
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          value={value || ''}
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          onChange={(e) => !readOnly && onChange(e.target.value)}
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          readOnly={readOnly}
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          min={min}
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          max={max || defaultMax}
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          className={cn(
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:            "w-full border border-neutral-200 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-black transition-all font-bold text-black",
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:            readOnly ? "bg-neutral-100 cursor-not-allowed" : "bg-neutral-50",
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:            className
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:          )}
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:        />
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:      )}
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:    </div>
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:  );
src/pages/QuickEdit.tsx:}

src/pages/Admin.tsx:function doPost(e) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:  try {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var data = JSON.parse(e.postData.contents);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    // Get Sub Division name/code dynamically from incoming payload (or fallback)
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var subDivision = (data["Sub Division"] || data["subDivisionName"] || data["subDivision"] || "").toString().trim();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    if (!subDivision) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      subDivision = "Default";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    // 1. Check and create Dynamic Google Drive Folder named "My Assistant [subDivision]"
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var folderName = "My Assistant " + subDivision;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var folder;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    try {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      var folders = DriveApp.getFoldersByName(folderName);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      if (folders.hasNext()) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        folder = folders.next();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        folder = DriveApp.createFolder(folderName);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      // Auto-share folder with the User's Google Drive Account!
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      var submitterEmail = (data["submitterEmail"] || data["submitter_email"] || "").toString().trim();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      if (submitterEmail) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        try {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          folder.addEditor(submitterEmail);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        } catch (shareErr) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          Logger.log("Failed to share folder: " + shareErr.toString());
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    } catch (err) {

src/pages/Admin.tsx:    }

src/pages/Admin.tsx:          "message": "Drive folder is not accessible to upload file."

src/pages/Admin.tsx:      var file = folder.createFile(fileBlob);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ 
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        "success": true, 
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        "message": "File saved to folder: " + folderName,
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        "fileId": file.getId(),
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        "url": file.getUrl()

src/pages/Admin.tsx:  const syncApprovedUsersSilently = async (

src/pages/Admin.tsx:  ) => {

src/pages/Admin.tsx:    try {

src/pages/Admin.tsx:      const rows = data.table.rows;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      if (!rows || rows.length === 0) return;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      const cols = data.table.cols.map((col: any) =>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        (col.label || "").trim().toLowerCase(),
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      );
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      let firstRowHeaders: string[] = [];
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      if (rows && rows.length > 0 && rows[0].c) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        firstRowHeaders = rows[0].c.map((cell: any) => {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          if (!cell) return "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          const val =
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            cell.v !== null && cell.v !== undefined
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              ? String(cell.v)
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              : cell.f !== null && cell.f !== undefined
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                ? String(cell.f)
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                : "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          return val.trim().toLowerCase();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        });
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      const findBestIndex = (
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        keywords: string[],
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        excludeKeywords: string[] = [],
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      ) => {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        const matchesLabel = (lbl: string) => {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          const hasKeyword = keywords.some((k) => lbl.includes(k));
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          const hasExclude = excludeKeywords.some((e) => lbl.includes(e));
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          return hasKeyword && !hasExclude;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        };
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        let idx = cols.findIndex(matchesLabel);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        if (idx !== -1) return { index: idx, isFirstRowHeader: false };
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        idx = firstRowHeaders.findIndex(matchesLabel);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        if (idx !== -1) return { index: idx, isFirstRowHeader: true };
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        return { index: -1, isFirstRowHeader: false };
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      };

src/pages/Admin.tsx:  const extractSheetId = (url: string) => {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    const match = url.match(/\/d\/([a-zA-Z0-9-_]+)/);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    return match ? match[1] : null;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:  };
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:  const fetchSheetData = async (sheetUrl: string, tabName: string) => {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    const sheetId = extractSheetId(sheetUrl);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    if (!sheetId) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      throw new Error(
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        "Invalid Google Sheet URL. Please make sure it is a valid spreadsheet link.",
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      );
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    const encodedTab = encodeURIComponent(tabName || "");
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    const fetchUrl = `https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/${sheetId}/gviz/tq?tqx=out:json${encodedTab ? `&sheet=${encodedTab}` : ""}`;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    const response = await fetch(fetchUrl);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    if (!response.ok) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      throw new Error(
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        "Could not fetch sheet data. Please check if the Google Sheet is shared with 'Anyone with the link can view' permission.",
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      );
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    const text = await response.text();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    const jsonStart = text.indexOf("{");
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    const jsonEnd = text.lastIndexOf("}");
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    if (jsonStart === -1 || jsonEnd === -1) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      throw new Error(
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        "Invalid response format received from Google Sheet visualization layer.",
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      );
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    const jsonText = text.substring(jsonStart, jsonEnd + 1);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    const data = JSON.parse(jsonText);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    if (!data?.table?.cols || !data?.table?.rows) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      throw new Error("Empty list or invalid columns loaded from your sheet.");
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    return data;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:  };
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:  const handleFetchSheetUsers = async () => {

src/pages/Admin.tsx:            if (!policeStationIndices.includes(idx)) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              policeStationIndices.push(idx);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            }

src/pages/Admin.tsx:      firstRowHeaders.forEach(matchPSColumn);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      // 1. Fully auto-detect email if not found by keywords or if keyword match was weak
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      let bestEmailColIdx = -1;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      let highestEmailScore = 0;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      let colEmailScores: { [idx: number]: number } = {};
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      for (let rIdx = 0; rIdx < Math.min(rows.length, 100); rIdx++) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        const row = rows[rIdx];
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        if (row && row.c) {

src/pages/Admin.tsx:                !val.includes("(")
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              ) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                colEmailScores[cIdx] = (colEmailScores[cIdx] || 0) + 1;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      Object.keys(colEmailScores).forEach((key) => {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        const idx = Number(key);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        if (colEmailScores[idx] > highestEmailScore) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          highestEmailScore = colEmailScores[idx];
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          bestEmailColIdx = idx;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      });

src/pages/Admin.tsx:        emailIdx = bestEmailColIdx;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      // Determine if the first row of data is actually the spreadsheet header row

src/pages/Admin.tsx:        (emailMatch.index !== -1 && emailMatch.isFirstRowHeader) ||
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        (nameMatch.index !== -1 && nameMatch.isFirstRowHeader) ||

src/pages/Admin.tsx:      }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      const startIndex = isFirstRowActuallyHeader ? 1 : 0;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      const mapped = rows
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        .slice(startIndex)

src/pages/Admin.tsx:            if (idx === -1 || !row.c || !row.c[idx]) return "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            const cell = row.c[idx];
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            const val =
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              cell.v !== null && cell.v !== undefined
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                ? cell.v
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                : cell.f !== null && cell.f !== undefined
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                  ? cell.f

src/pages/Admin.tsx:

src/pages/Admin.tsx:          const subDivision = getVal(subDivIdx);

src/pages/Admin.tsx:          const sdoName = getVal(sdoNameIdx);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          const sdoNameUrdu = getVal(sdoNameUrduIdx);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          const designation = getVal(designationIdx);

src/pages/Admin.tsx:          const sdoMobile = getVal(sdoMobileIdx);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          const userMobile = userMobileIdx !== -1 ? getVal(userMobileIdx) : "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          // Multi-police stations retrieval and auto Urdu translation
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          const policeStations: string[] = [];
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          const policeStationsUrdu: string[] = [];
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          policeStationIndices.forEach((idx) => {

src/pages/Admin.tsx:            if (val && !policeStations.includes(val)) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              policeStations.push(val);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              // Find corresponding Urdu translation column if any
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              const engHeader = String(firstRowHeaders[idx] || cols[idx] || '').toLowerCase();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              const numMatch = engHeader.match(/\d+/);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              const num = numMatch ? numMatch[0] : "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              let foundUrduVal = "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              if (num) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                const matchingUrduIdx = policeStationUrduIndices.find((uIdx) => {

src/pages/Admin.tsx:                  return uHeader.includes(num);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                });
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                if (matchingUrduIdx !== undefined) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                  foundUrduVal = getVal(matchingUrduIdx).trim();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              if (!foundUrduVal && idx + 1 < (firstRowHeaders.length || cols.length)) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                const nextHeader = String(firstRowHeaders[idx + 1] || cols[idx + 1] || '').toLowerCase();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                if (nextHeader.includes("urdu")) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                  foundUrduVal = getVal(idx + 1).trim();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              if (!foundUrduVal) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                foundUrduVal = translateToUrdu(val);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              policeStationsUrdu.push(foundUrduVal);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          });
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          if (policeStations.length === 0 && policeStationIdx !== -1) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            const val = getVal(policeStationIdx).trim();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            if (val) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              policeStations.push(val);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              const uVal = policeStationUrduIdx !== -1 ? getVal(policeStationUrduIdx).trim() : translateToUrdu(val);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              policeStationsUrdu.push(uVal);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          const policeStation = policeStations[0] || "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          const policeStationUrdu = policeStationsUrdu[0] || "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          const cleanStatus = rawStatus.toLowerCase();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          // Allowed if cell starts with y, yes, allow, approve, ok, check, or matches typical allow values
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          // If status column is not present (statusIdx === -1), default all rows to allowed (isAllowed = true) so they can use it

src/pages/Admin.tsx:            cleanStatus === "allow" ||
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            cleanStatus === "yes" ||
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            cleanStatus === "approved" ||
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            cleanStatus === "true" ||
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            cleanStatus === "y" ||
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            cleanStatus === "ok" ||

src/pages/Admin.tsx:                      </h3>
