src/pages/Admin.tsx:                      </p>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                    </div>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                  </div>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                  <button
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                    type="button"
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                    onClick={() => {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                      const regAppsScript = `// Google Form Registration Auto-Sync Script
src/pages/Admin.tsx:// Paste this code inside your Google Sheets (connected to Google Forms) Extensions > Apps Script
src/pages/Admin.tsx:// After pasting, click the clock/trigger icon on the left parent menu, and add a trigger:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:// Choose function: "onFormSubmitTrigger", Event source: "From spreadsheet", Event type: "On form submit".
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:// CRITICAL STEP to fix "You do not have permission to call UrlFetchApp.fetch" error:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:// 1. In Apps Script editor toolbar, select "testWebhook" from the function dropdown menu.
src/pages/Admin.tsx:// 2. Click the "Run" (▷) button.
src/pages/Admin.tsx:// 3. A popup will ask you for Authorization. Click "Review Permissions".
src/pages/Admin.tsx:// 4. Select your Google account, click "Advanced" at the bottom, click "Go to Untitled project (unsafe)", and click "Allow".
src/pages/Admin.tsx:// 5. This grants active permission for UrlFetchApp.fetch so your automated onFormSubmit trigger can run!
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:function testWebhook() {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:  var url = "${window.location.origin}/api/approve-user";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:  var testPayload = {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    email: "test_authorization@example.com",
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    name: "SDO Authorized Device",
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    subDivision: "Gulberg",
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    isAllowed: true,
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    sdoName: "Test Officer",
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    designation: "SDO"
src/pages/Admin.tsx:  };
src/pages/Admin.tsx:  try {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var response = UrlFetchApp.fetch(url, {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      method: "post",
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      contentType: "application/json",
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      payload: JSON.stringify(testPayload),
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      muteHttpExceptions: true
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    });
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    Logger.log("Response status: " + response.getResponseCode());
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    Logger.log("Response content: " + response.getContentText());
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    try {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      SpreadsheetApp.getUi().alert("🎉 Authorization Successful! Your Google Spreadsheet is now allowed to automatically trigger real-time registrations to your server!");
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    } catch(uiErr) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      Logger.log("Authorized successfully but UI is not accessible in this context: " + uiErr.toString());
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:  } catch(error) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    Logger.log("Error: " + error.toString());
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    try {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      SpreadsheetApp.getUi().alert("Authorization failed: " + error.toString());
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    } catch(uiErr) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      Logger.log("Authorization failed and UI not accessible: " + error.toString());
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:  }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:}
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:function onFormSubmitTrigger(e) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:  try {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var sheet = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet().getActiveSheet();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    // Fetch headers dynamically to locate column positions
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var headers = sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues()[0];
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    function findColumnIndex(keywords) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      for (var i = 0; i < headers.length; i++) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        var header = headers[i].toString().toLowerCase().trim();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        for (var j = 0; j < keywords.length; j++) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          if (header.indexOf(keywords[j]) !== -1) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            return i + 1; // 1-based index for Range
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      return -1;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    // Scan standard columns dynamically (urdu/english flexible matching)
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var emailCol = findColumnIndex(['e-mail address', 'email', 'mail', 'ای میل', 'address', 'gmail']);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var nameCol = findColumnIndex(['user name', 'username', 'user_name', 'employee name', 'name', 'نام', 'صارف', 'employee']);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var subDivCol = findColumnIndex(['sub divisional code', 'sub divisional', 'sub division', 'subdivision', 'shoba', 'code', 'شعبہ', 'کوڈ']);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var sdoNameCol = findColumnIndex(['sdo name', 'officer name', 'sdo_name']);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var sdoNameUrduCol = findColumnIndex(['sdo name (urdu)', 'sdo name urdu', 'sdo_name_urdu', 'name (urdu)', 'name(urdu)']);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var designationCol = findColumnIndex(['designation', 'post', 'scale']);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var sdoMobileCol = findColumnIndex(['sdo mobile no', 'sdo mobile', 'sdo mobile no.', 'sdo_mobile', 'contact', 'mobi', 'phone']);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var sdoCnicCol = findColumnIndex(['sdo cnic no', 'sdo cnic no.', 'sdo cnic', 'sdo_cnic', 'cnic', 'شناختی کارڈ']);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var userMobileCol = findColumnIndex(['user mobile no', 'user mobile', 'user phone', 'user contact', 'user_mobile', 'موبائل نمبر']);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var statusCol = findColumnIndex(['status', 'allowed', 'approved', 'منظور', 'اجازت']);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    // Multi police station lookups (Name Of Police Station 1 to 5)
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var policeStations = [];
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var policeStationsUrdu = [];
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var psCols = [];
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    for (var colIdx = 1; colIdx <= sheet.getLastColumn(); colIdx++) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      var headerName = headers[colIdx - 1].toString().toLowerCase();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      if ((headerName.indexOf('police') !== -1 && headerName.indexOf('station') !== -1) || headerName.indexOf('thana') !== -1) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        if (headerName.indexOf('urdu') === -1) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          psCols.push(colIdx);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    psCols.forEach(function(col) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      var englishVal = getValue(col);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      if (englishVal) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        policeStations.push(englishVal);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        var headerName = headers[col - 1].toString().toLowerCase();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        var numMatch = headerName.match(/\d+/);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        var num = numMatch ? numMatch[0] : "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        var foundUrduCol = -1;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        for (var uCol = 1; uCol <= sheet.getLastColumn(); uCol++) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          var uHeader = headers[uCol - 1].toString().toLowerCase();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          if (uHeader.indexOf('urdu') !== -1 && (uHeader.indexOf('police') !== -1 || uHeader.indexOf('thana') !== -1)) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            if (num && uHeader.indexOf(num) !== -1) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              foundUrduCol = uCol;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:              break;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        if (foundUrduCol === -1 && col < sheet.getLastColumn()) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          var nextHeader = headers[col].toString().toLowerCase();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          if (nextHeader.indexOf('urdu') !== -1) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:            foundUrduCol = col + 1;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:          }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        var urduVal = foundUrduCol !== -1 ? getValue(foundUrduCol) : "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:        policeStationsUrdu.push(urduVal);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    });
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    if (emailCol === -1) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      Logger.log("Email address column not detected.");
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      return;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    // Fetch newly submitted row values
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var rowValues = sheet.getRange(lastRow, 1, 1, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues()[0];
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    function getValue(colIndex) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      if (colIndex === -1 || colIndex > rowValues.length) return "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      return rowValues[colIndex - 1].toString().trim();
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var email = getValue(emailCol);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var name = getValue(nameCol);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var subDivision = getValue(subDivCol);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var sdoName = sdoNameCol !== -1 ? getValue(sdoNameCol) : name;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var sdoNameUrdu = sdoNameUrduCol !== -1 ? getValue(sdoNameUrduCol) : "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var designation = designationCol !== -1 ? getValue(designationCol) : "SDO (Operation)";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var sdoMobile = sdoMobileCol !== -1 ? getValue(sdoMobileCol) : "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var sdoCnic = sdoCnicCol !== -1 ? getValue(sdoCnicCol) : "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var userMobile = userMobileCol !== -1 ? getValue(userMobileCol) : "";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var rawStatus = statusCol !== -1 ? getValue(statusCol).toLowerCase() : "allow";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var isAllowed = (statusCol === -1 || rawStatus === 'allow' || rawStatus === 'yes' || rawStatus === 'approved' || rawStatus === 'true' || rawStatus === 'allowed' || rawStatus === 'منظور');
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    // Build Sync Payload
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var payload = {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      email: email,
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      name: name,
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      subDivision: subDivision,
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      sdoName: sdoName,
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      sdoNameUrdu: sdoNameUrdu,
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      designation: designation,
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      sdoMobile: sdoMobile,
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      sdoCnic: sdoCnic,
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      userMobile: userMobile,
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      policeStations: policeStations,
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      policeStationsUrdu: policeStationsUrdu,
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      isAllowed: isAllowed
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    };
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    // Post directly to our backend server
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var webhookUrl = "${window.location.origin}/api/approve-user";
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var options = {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      method: "post",
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      contentType: "application/json",
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      payload: JSON.stringify(payload),
src/pages/Admin.tsx:      muteHttpExceptions: true
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    };
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    var response = UrlFetchApp.fetch(webhookUrl, options);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    Logger.log("Webhook response status: " + response.getResponseCode());
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    Logger.log("Webhook response content: " + response.getContentText());
src/pages/Admin.tsx:  } catch (error) {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:    Logger.log("Auto sync failed: " + error.toString());
src/pages/Admin.tsx:  }
src/pages/Admin.tsx:}`;
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                      navigator.clipboard.writeText(regAppsScript).then(() => {
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                        setCopiedRegScript(true);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                        toast.success("Registration Form Apps Script copied!");
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                        setTimeout(() => setCopiedRegScript(false), 2000);
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                      });
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                    }}
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                    className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl bg-emerald-600 text-white font-bold hover:bg-emerald-700 transition-colors cursor-pointer text-[10px]"
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                  >
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                    {copiedRegScript ? (
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                      <>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                        <Check className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                        <span>Copied!</span>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                      </>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                    ) : (
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                      <>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                        <Copy className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                        <span>Copy Script</span>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                      </>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                    )}
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                  </button>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                </div>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                <div className="bg-amber-500/10 dark:bg-amber-500/5 border border-amber-500/20 rounded-2xl p-3.5 space-y-1.5">
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                  <p className="text-xs font-bold text-amber-700 dark:text-amber-400 flex items-center gap-1.5 font-sans">
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                    <span>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                      ⚠️ Important Step to Fix Authorization Permission Issue:
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                    </span>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                  </p>
src/pages/Admin.tsx:                  <p className="text-[11px] text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-350 font-medium leading-relaxed font-sans">

src/firebase.ts:// Validate Connection to Firestore with retry logic
src/firebase.ts:async function testConnection(retries = 5, delay = 3000) {
src/firebase.ts:  for (let i = 0; i < retries; i++) {
src/firebase.ts:    try {
src/firebase.ts:      console.log(`Testing connection to Firestore database: ${databaseId} (Attempt ${i + 1})`);
src/firebase.ts:      const testDoc = doc(db, 'test', 'connection');
src/firebase.ts:      
src/firebase.ts:      // Use getDocFromServer to actually check backend availability
src/firebase.ts:      await getDocFromServer(testDoc);
src/firebase.ts:      
src/firebase.ts:      console.log('Firestore connection test successful');
src/firebase.ts:      return;
src/firebase.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
src/firebase.ts:      // code=unavailable is common during early boot or in certain network conditions
src/firebase.ts:      console.warn(`Firestore Connection Attempt ${i + 1} failed:`, error.code, error.message);
src/firebase.ts:      
src/firebase.ts:      if (i < retries - 1) {
src/firebase.ts:        // Staggered retry
src/firebase.ts:        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, delay * (i + 1)));
src/firebase.ts:      } else {
src/firebase.ts:        console.error("Firestore is persistently unavailable. This typically indicates a network restriction or propagation delay.");
src/firebase.ts:      }
src/firebase.ts:    }
src/firebase.ts:  }
src/firebase.ts:}
src/firebase.ts:
src/firebase.ts:// Wait a bit before testing to ensure the environment is fully ready
src/firebase.ts:setTimeout(() => testConnection(), 5000);

src/firebase.ts:  path: string | null;
src/firebase.ts:  authInfo: {
src/firebase.ts:    userId: string | undefined;
src/firebase.ts:    email: string | null | undefined;
src/firebase.ts:    emailVerified: boolean | undefined;
src/firebase.ts:    isAnonymous: boolean | undefined;
src/firebase.ts:    tenantId: string | null | undefined;
src/firebase.ts:    providerInfo: {
src/firebase.ts:      providerId: string;
src/firebase.ts:      displayName: string | null;
src/firebase.ts:      email: string | null;

src/firebase.ts:  }

src/firebase.ts:
src/firebase.ts:export function handleFirestoreError(error: unknown, operationType: OperationType, path: string | null) {
src/firebase.ts:  const errInfo: FirestoreErrorInfo = {
src/firebase.ts:    error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
src/firebase.ts:    authInfo: {
src/firebase.ts:      userId: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/firebase.ts:      email: auth.currentUser?.email,
src/firebase.ts:      emailVerified: auth.currentUser?.emailVerified,
src/firebase.ts:      isAnonymous: auth.currentUser?.isAnonymous,
src/firebase.ts:      tenantId: auth.currentUser?.tenantId,
src/firebase.ts:      providerInfo: auth.currentUser?.providerData.map(provider => ({
src/firebase.ts:        providerId: provider.providerId,
src/firebase.ts:        displayName: provider.displayName,
src/firebase.ts:        email: provider.email,
src/firebase.ts:        photoUrl: provider.photoURL
src/firebase.ts:      })) || []
src/firebase.ts:    },
src/firebase.ts:    operationType,
src/firebase.ts:    path
src/firebase.ts:  }
src/firebase.ts:  console.error('Firestore Error: ', safeStringify(errInfo));
src/firebase.ts:  throw new Error(safeStringify(errInfo));

src/App.tsx:    const cleanupTarget = async () => {
src/App.tsx:      const targetRef = "06117520986400";

src/App.tsx:      });

api/index.ts:function getRobustErrorMessage(error: any): string {
api/index.ts:  console.error("Gemini API Error details:", error);
api/index.ts:  let errorMsg = "";
api/index.ts:  if (typeof error === 'string') {
api/index.ts:    errorMsg = error;
api/index.ts:  } else if (error && typeof error === 'object') {
api/index.ts:    errorMsg = error.message || error.statusText || "";
api/index.ts:    
api/index.ts:    if (error.status) {
api/index.ts:      errorMsg += ` Status: ${error.status}`;
api/index.ts:    }
api/index.ts:    if (error.error?.message) {
api/index.ts:      errorMsg += ` Details: ${error.error.message}`;
api/index.ts:    } else if (error.error?.details) {
api/index.ts:      errorMsg += ` Details: ${JSON.stringify(error.error.details)}`;
api/index.ts:    }
api/index.ts:    
api/index.ts:    if (!errorMsg) {
api/index.ts:      try {
api/index.ts:        errorMsg = JSON.stringify(error);
api/index.ts:      } catch (_) {
api/index.ts:        errorMsg = String(error);
api/index.ts:      }
api/index.ts:    }
api/index.ts:  } else {
api/index.ts:    errorMsg = String(error);
api/index.ts:  }
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:  const errorLower = errorMsg.toLowerCase();
api/index.ts:  const isQuota = errorLower.includes('429') || 
api/index.ts:                  errorLower.includes('resource_exhausted') || 
api/index.ts:                  errorLower.includes('quota') || 
api/index.ts:                  errorLower.includes('rate limit') || 
api/index.ts:                  errorLower.includes('exceeded limit') || 
api/index.ts:                  errorLower.includes('limit exceeded');
api/index.ts:                  
api/index.ts:  const isInvalidKey = errorLower.includes('api key not valid') || 
api/index.ts:                       errorLower.includes('invalid api key') || 
api/index.ts:                       errorLower.includes('key not found') ||
api/index.ts:                       errorLower.includes('api_key_invalid') ||
api/index.ts:                       errorLower.includes('invalid_api_key');
api/index.ts:                       
api/index.ts:  const isUnavailable = errorLower.includes('503') || 
api/index.ts:                        errorLower.includes('unavailable') || 
api/index.ts:                        errorLower.includes('high demand') || 
api/index.ts:                        errorLower.includes('capacity') ||
api/index.ts:                        errorLower.includes('busy') ||
api/index.ts:                        errorLower.includes('overloaded');
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:  if (isInvalidKey) {
api/index.ts:    return 'Invalid Gemini API Key. Please update your API Key in the AI Studio platform or Vercel Environment Variables.';
api/index.ts:  }
api/index.ts:  if (isQuota) {
api/index.ts:    return 'Gemini API Free Tier quota exceeded limit. Please wait and try again, or use the official LESCO fallback portal.';
api/index.ts:  }
api/index.ts:  if (isUnavailable) {
api/index.ts:    return 'Google AI service is currently experiencing high demand and is unavailable. Please try again later, or use the official LESCO fallback portal.';
api/index.ts:  }
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:  if (errorMsg && errorMsg.includes('{') && errorMsg.includes('}')) {
api/index.ts:    try {
api/index.ts:      const jsonStart = errorMsg.indexOf('{');
api/index.ts:      const parsed = JSON.parse(errorMsg.substring(jsonStart));
api/index.ts:      if (parsed.error?.message) {
api/index.ts:        errorMsg = parsed.error.message;
api/index.ts:      } else if (parsed.message) {
api/index.ts:        errorMsg = parsed.message;
api/index.ts:      }
api/index.ts:    } catch (_) {}
api/index.ts:  }
api/index.ts:  
api/index.ts:  if (errorMsg.startsWith('{"error"')) {
api/index.ts:    try {
api/index.ts:      const p = JSON.parse(errorMsg);
api/index.ts:      if (p.error?.message) {
api/index.ts:        errorMsg = p.error.message;
api/index.ts:      }
api/index.ts:    } catch(_) {}
api/index.ts:  }
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:  return errorMsg || 'An unexpected error occurred during AI analysis. Please try again.';
api/index.ts:}
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:function cleanAndParseJSON(text: string) {
api/index.ts:  const cleanText = text.trim();
api/index.ts:  if (!cleanText || cleanText === 'undefined') {
api/index.ts:    throw new Error("Empty response from AI");
api/index.ts:  }
api/index.ts:  
api/index.ts:  // Try direct parsing first
api/index.ts:  try {
api/index.ts:    return JSON.parse(cleanText);
api/index.ts:  } catch (err) {
api/index.ts:    // If direct parse fails, find boundaries of JSON object or array
api/index.ts:    const startObj = cleanText.indexOf('{');
api/index.ts:    const startArr = cleanText.indexOf('[');
api/index.ts:    
api/index.ts:    if (startObj !== -1 || startArr !== -1) {
api/index.ts:      const isObject = startObj !== -1 && (startArr === -1 || startObj < startArr);
api/index.ts:      const startIdx = isObject ? startObj : startArr;
api/index.ts:      const endToken = isObject ? '}' : ']';
api/index.ts:      const endIdx = cleanText.lastIndexOf(endToken);
api/index.ts:      
api/index.ts:      if (endIdx !== -1 && endIdx > startIdx) {
api/index.ts:        const potentialJson = cleanText.substring(startIdx, endIdx + 1);
api/index.ts:        try {
api/index.ts:          return JSON.parse(potentialJson);
api/index.ts:        } catch (subErr) {
api/index.ts:          console.error("Sub-parsing of extracted JSON block failed. Raw potential content:", potentialJson);
api/index.ts:        }
api/index.ts:      }
api/index.ts:    }
api/index.ts:    
api/index.ts:    // Last ditch fallback: strip any Markdown codes and try once more
api/index.ts:    let cleaned = cleanText
api/index.ts:      .replace(/^```json/gi, '')
api/index.ts:      .replace(/^```/g, '')
api/index.ts:      .replace(/```$/g, '')
api/index.ts:      .trim();
api/index.ts:    return JSON.parse(cleaned);
api/index.ts:  }
api/index.ts:}
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:app.post("/api/extract-bill", async (req, res) => {
api/index.ts:  try {
api/index.ts:    console.log(`[extract-bill] type of req.body: ${typeof req.body}, isArray: ${Array.isArray(req.body)}`);
api/index.ts:    if (req.body) {
api/index.ts:      console.log(`[extract-bill] req.body keys: ${Object.keys(req.body).join(", ")}`);
api/index.ts:    }

api/index.ts:- DO NOT hallucinate values. If a number is unclear or NOT VISIBLE in the screenshot, use an empty string "" instead of "N/A" where possible, especially for numeric fields.
api/index.ts:- DO NOT repeat values (like "55") across months if they are different on the bill.
api/index.ts:- For historical tables, extract EXACTLY what is written in each row.
api/index.ts:- Ensure the 'Month' and 'Year' match the table rows precisely (e.g., "MAR 25").
api/index.ts:- SPECIFIC GUARD: The status code "SS" (Status Same) is frequently misread as "55". If you see "SS" or something looking like "55" in a column where it could be a status code (like Units or Reading), verify carefully. If it is a status code, output "SS".
api/index.ts:- DO NOT fill in months that are not present in the image table. If only 10 months are visible, output only those 10 months.
api/index.ts:

api/index.ts:- If a value in the table is "N/A", empty, or unclear, use an empty string "" for that specific field (units, bill, adj, or payment). 
api/index.ts:- DO NOT combine multiple fields into one. Each field must be its own value in the object.
api/index.ts:- If a row is partially unreadable, still extract the readable parts (like Month and Units).

api/index.ts:   Columns are usually: Month, Units, Bill, Adj, Payment/Balance.

api/index.ts:    const uniqueUrls = [...new Set(urls)];
api/index.ts:    
api/index.ts:    let response: any = null;
api/index.ts:    let lastError = "";
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:    const userAgents = [
api/index.ts:      'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36',

api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:    // Try fetching from all URLs in parallel with staggered starts
api/index.ts:    try {
api/index.ts:      console.log(`Starting parallel fetch for reference: ${cleanRef} with ${uniqueUrls.length} mirrors`);
api/index.ts:      
api/index.ts:      const agent = new https.Agent({
api/index.ts:        // rejectUnauthorized: false - removed for security
api/index.ts:      });
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:      response = await Promise.any(uniqueUrls.map(async (url, index) => {
api/index.ts:        let attempts = 0;
api/index.ts:        const maxAttempts = 2; 
api/index.ts:        
api/index.ts:        // Add a small staggered delay for each mirror to avoid being flagged
api/index.ts:        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, index * 200));
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:        while (attempts < maxAttempts) {
api/index.ts:          try {
api/index.ts:            attempts++;
api/index.ts:            
api/index.ts:            const res = await axios.get(url, {
api/index.ts:              headers: {
api/index.ts:                'User-Agent': userAgents[(index + attempts) % userAgents.length],
api/index.ts:                'Accept': 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8',
api/index.ts:                'Accept-Language': 'en-US,en;q=0.9',
api/index.ts:                'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
api/index.ts:                'Pragma': 'no-cache',
api/index.ts:                'Connection': 'keep-alive',
api/index.ts:              },
api/index.ts:              httpsAgent: agent,
api/index.ts:              timeout: 30000 // Increased from 15s to 30s
api/index.ts:            });
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:            const data = res.data.toString();
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:            if (data.includes("Reference Number Not Found") || data.includes("Invalid Reference Number") || data.includes("Record Not Found") || data.includes("not found in our record")) {
api/index.ts:              throw new Error("Reference Number not found");
api/index.ts:            }
api/index.ts:

api/index.ts:              throw new Error("Portal is busy");
api/index.ts:            }
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:            if (data.includes("Consumer Name") || data.includes("NAME & ADDRESS") || data.includes("Reference No") || data.includes("BILLING MONTH") || data.includes("LESCO BILL")) {
api/index.ts:              console.log(`Successfully fetched from: ${url} (Attempt ${attempts})`);
api/index.ts:              return res;
api/index.ts:            } else {
api/index.ts:              throw new Error("Invalid page content or portal busy");
api/index.ts:            }
api/index.ts:          } catch (err: any) {
api/index.ts:            if (attempts >= maxAttempts || err.message === "Reference Number not found") {
api/index.ts:              throw err;
api/index.ts:            }
api/index.ts:            // Wait a bit before retry
api/index.ts:            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
api/index.ts:          }
api/index.ts:        }
api/index.ts:      }));
api/index.ts:    } catch (err: any) {
api/index.ts:      // Promise.any throws AggregateError if all fail
api/index.ts:      if (err.name === 'AggregateError') {
api/index.ts:        lastError = err.errors.map((e: any) => e.message).join(' | ');
api/index.ts:      } else {
api/index.ts:        lastError = err.message || "All LESCO portals are currently unresponsive";
api/index.ts:      }

api/index.ts:    }
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:    if (!response) {
api/index.ts:      const errorMsg = lastError.includes('timeout') 
api/index.ts:        ? "LESCO servers took too long to respond. This usually happens during peak hours. Please try again in a few minutes or enter details manually."
api/index.ts:        : `LESCO servers are currently unresponsive (${lastError}). Please enter details manually.`;
api/index.ts:      throw new Error(errorMsg);
api/index.ts:    }
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:    const $ = cheerio.load(response.data);
api/index.ts:    
api/index.ts:    // Improved extraction logic for PITC/LESCO layout
api/index.ts:    const getTextByLabel = (label: string) => {
api/index.ts:      const lowerLabel = label.toLowerCase();
api/index.ts:      let val = "";
api/index.ts:      
api/index.ts:      $('*').each((i, el) => {
api/index.ts:        const text = $(el).text().trim().toLowerCase();
api/index.ts:        if (text === lowerLabel || text.startsWith(lowerLabel + ':') || text.startsWith(lowerLabel + ' :')) {
api/index.ts:          // Try next sibling
api/index.ts:          val = $(el).next().text().trim();
api/index.ts:          if (!val) {
api/index.ts:            // Try parent's last child
api/index.ts:            val = $(el).parent().children().last().text().trim();
api/index.ts:          }
api/index.ts:          // If the value is still the label or empty, try to find in the same row
api/index.ts:          if (!val || val.toLowerCase() === lowerLabel) {
api/index.ts:            val = $(el).closest('tr').find('td').last().text().trim();
api/index.ts:          }
api/index.ts:          if (val && val.toLowerCase() !== lowerLabel) return false; // break
api/index.ts:        }
api/index.ts:      });
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:      // Fallback: search for label anywhere and get next text node
api/index.ts:      if (!val) {
api/index.ts:        $(`td:contains("${label}")`).each((i, el) => {
api/index.ts:          const nextText = $(el).next().text().trim();
api/index.ts:          if (nextText) {
api/index.ts:            val = nextText;
api/index.ts:            return false;
api/index.ts:          }
api/index.ts:        });
api/index.ts:      }
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:      return val;
api/index.ts:    };
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:    // Specific logic for Name & Address which is often in a larger block
api/index.ts:    let consumerName = "";
api/index.ts:    let address = "";
api/index.ts:    
api/index.ts:    const nameAddrTd = $(`td:contains("NAME & ADDRESS"), td:contains("Name & Address")`).next('td');
api/index.ts:    if (nameAddrTd.length) {
api/index.ts:      const text = nameAddrTd.text().trim();
api/index.ts:      const parts = text.split('\n').map(p => p.trim()).filter(p => p);
api/index.ts:      consumerName = parts[0] || "";
api/index.ts:      address = parts.slice(1).join(', ') || "";
api/index.ts:    }
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:    if (!consumerName) consumerName = getTextByLabel("NAME") || getTextByLabel("Consumer Name") || "Unknown Consumer";
api/index.ts:    if (!address) address = getTextByLabel("ADDRESS") || "Address not found";
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:    const monthWiseUnits: { month: string, units: number, bill?: number, adj?: number, payment?: number }[] = [];
api/index.ts:    $('table').each((i, table) => {
api/index.ts:      const text = $(table).text().toUpperCase();
api/index.ts:      if (text.includes('MONTH') && text.includes('UNITS')) {
api/index.ts:        $(table).find('tr').each((j, tr) => {
api/index.ts:          const tds = $(tr).find('td');
api/index.ts:          // LESCO historical table usually has: Month, Units, Bill, Adj, Payment, Balance
api/index.ts:          if (tds.length >= 2) {
api/index.ts:            const month = $(tds[0]).text().trim();
api/index.ts:            const unitsText = $(tds[1]).text().replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
api/index.ts:            const units = parseInt(unitsText);
api/index.ts:            
api/index.ts:            if (month && month.length >= 3 && month.length <= 6 && !isNaN(units)) {
api/index.ts:              const entry: any = { month, units };
api/index.ts:              
api/index.ts:              if (tds.length >= 3) {
api/index.ts:                const billText = $(tds[2]).text().replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
api/index.ts:                if (billText) entry.bill = parseInt(billText);
api/index.ts:              }
api/index.ts:              if (tds.length >= 4) {
api/index.ts:                const adjText = $(tds[3]).text().replace(/[^0-9-]/g, '');
api/index.ts:                if (adjText) entry.adj = parseInt(adjText);
api/index.ts:              }
api/index.ts:              if (tds.length >= 5) {
api/index.ts:                const paymentText = $(tds[4]).text().replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
api/index.ts:                if (paymentText) entry.payment = parseInt(paymentText);
api/index.ts:              }
api/index.ts:              
api/index.ts:              if (monthWiseUnits.length < 24) { // Limit to 2 years of history
api/index.ts:                monthWiseUnits.push(entry);
api/index.ts:              }
api/index.ts:            }
api/index.ts:          }
api/index.ts:        });
api/index.ts:      }
api/index.ts:    });
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:    // Sort by month if possible, or just keep as is
api/index.ts:    // LESCO tables are usually reverse chronological
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:    const billData = {
api/index.ts:      consumerName: consumerName,
api/index.ts:      address: address,
api/index.ts:      referenceNumber: cleanRef,
api/index.ts:      unitsConsumed: parseInt((getTextByLabel("UNITS CONSUMED") || getTextByLabel("Units") || "0").replace(/[^0-9]/g, '')) || 0,
api/index.ts:      amountDue: parseFloat((getTextByLabel("TOTAL PAYABLE") || getTextByLabel("Payable") || "0").replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || 0,
api/index.ts:      billingMonth: getTextByLabel("BILLING MONTH") || getTextByLabel("Month") || "N/A",
api/index.ts:      sanctionedLoad: getTextByLabel("LOAD") || getTextByLabel("SANCTIONED LOAD") || getTextByLabel("SANC LOAD") || "N/A",
api/index.ts:      connectionType: getTextByLabel("TARIFF") || "N/A",
api/index.ts:      customerId: getTextByLabel("CONSUMER ID") || getTextByLabel("CUSTOMER ID") || getTextByLabel("CONS ID") || "N/A",
api/index.ts:      currentBill: parseFloat(getTextByLabel("CURRENT BILL").replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || 0,
api/index.ts:      deferredAmount: parseFloat(getTextByLabel("DEFERRED AMOUNT").replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || parseFloat(getTextByLabel("DEFERRED").replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || 0,
api/index.ts:      previousReading: getTextByLabel("PREVIOUS READING") || getTextByLabel("PREV RDG") || getTextByLabel("PREVIOUS") || "N/A",
api/index.ts:      meterNoOnBill: getTextByLabel("METER NO") || getTextByLabel("METER NUMBER") || "N/A",
api/index.ts:      feederName: getTextByLabel("FEEDER") || getTextByLabel("FEEDER NAME") || "N/A",
api/index.ts:      monthWiseUnitsConsumed: getTextByLabel("MONTH WISE UNITS CONSUMED") || "N/A",
api/index.ts:      monthWiseUnits: monthWiseUnits.length > 0 ? monthWiseUnits : undefined,
api/index.ts:    };
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:    // Final check - if we got nothing, it's a failure
api/index.ts:    if (billData.consumerName === "Unknown" && billData.amountDue === 0) {
api/index.ts:      console.error("Scraping failed: No data extracted from portal");
api/index.ts:      throw new Error("Could not parse bill data. The portal structure might have changed.");
api/index.ts:    }
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:    console.log(`Sending bill data for ref: ${cleanRef}, units: ${billData.monthWiseUnits?.length || 0}`);
api/index.ts:    res.json(billData);
api/index.ts:  } catch (error: any) {
api/index.ts:    console.error("Scraping error:", error.message);
api/index.ts:    
api/index.ts:    res.status(500).json({ 
api/index.ts:      error: error.message || "Failed to fetch actual bill data.",
api/index.ts:      details: error.stack
api/index.ts:    });
api/index.ts:  }
api/index.ts:});

api/index.ts:app.post("/api/upload", upload.single('file'), async (req, res) => {
api/index.ts:  const bucket = getBucket();
api/index.ts:  if (!bucket) {
api/index.ts:    return res.status(500).json({ error: "Firebase Admin not initialized. Upload unavailable." });
api/index.ts:  }
api/index.ts:  if (!req.file) {
api/index.ts:    return res.status(400).json({ error: "No file uploaded" });
api/index.ts:  }
api/index.ts:  const { template } = req.body;
api/index.ts:  const file = req.file;
api/index.ts:  const blob = bucket.file(`templates/${template}`);
api/index.ts:  const blobStream = blob.createWriteStream({
api/index.ts:    metadata: { contentType: file.mimetype }
api/index.ts:  });
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:  blobStream.on('error', (err: any) => {
api/index.ts:    res.status(500).json({ error: err.message });
api/index.ts:  });
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:  blobStream.on('finish', async () => {
api/index.ts:    try {
api/index.ts:      const publicUrl = await blob.getSignedUrl({
api/index.ts:        action: 'read',
api/index.ts:        expires: '03-01-2500'
api/index.ts:      });
api/index.ts:      res.status(200).json({ url: publicUrl[0] });
api/index.ts:    } catch (err: any) {
api/index.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to generate signed URL: " + err.message });
api/index.ts:    }
api/index.ts:  });
api/index.ts:
api/index.ts:  blobStream.end(file.buffer);
api/index.ts:});

api/index.ts:  });

api/index.ts:app.post("/api/save-to-sheets", async (req, res) => {

api/index.ts:    // Order: Timestamp, Ref #, Name, Address, Billing Month, Units, Bill Amount, Sanctioned Load, Status

api/index.ts:      new Date().toLocaleString(),
api/index.ts:      data.referenceNumber || "N/A",
api/index.ts:      data.consumerName || "N/A",
api/index.ts:      data.address || "N/A",
api/index.ts:      data.billingMonth || "N/A",

api/index.ts:      valueInputOption: "USER_ENTERED",
api/index.ts:      requestBody: {
api/index.ts:        values: [row],
api/index.ts:      },
api/index.ts:    });
api/index.ts:

replace-colors.ts:import fs from 'fs';
replace-colors.ts:import path from 'path';
replace-colors.ts:
replace-colors.ts:function walkDir(dir: string, callback: (filepath: string) => void) {
replace-colors.ts:  fs.readdirSync(dir).forEach(f => {
replace-colors.ts:    let dirPath = path.join(dir, f);
replace-colors.ts:    let isDirectory = fs.statSync(dirPath).isDirectory();
replace-colors.ts:    isDirectory ? 
replace-colors.ts:      walkDir(dirPath, callback) : callback(path.join(dir, f));
replace-colors.ts:  });
replace-colors.ts:}
replace-colors.ts:
replace-colors.ts:walkDir('./src', (filepath) => {
replace-colors.ts:  if (filepath.endsWith('.tsx') || filepath.endsWith('.ts') || filepath.endsWith('.css')) {
replace-colors.ts:    let content = fs.readFileSync(filepath, 'utf8');
replace-colors.ts:    let original = content;
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/bg-red-/g, 'bg-indigo-');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/text-red-/g, 'text-indigo-');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/border-red-/g, 'border-indigo-');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/ring-red-/g, 'ring-indigo-');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/shadow-red-/g, 'shadow-indigo-');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/from-red-/g, 'from-indigo-');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/to-red-/g, 'to-indigo-');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/accent-red-/g, 'accent-indigo-');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/bg-rose-/g, 'bg-indigo-');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/text-rose-/g, 'text-indigo-');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/shadow-rose-/g, 'shadow-indigo-');
replace-colors.ts:    
replace-colors.ts:    // Also make big padding buttons responsive
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/px-8 py-4/g, 'px-4 sm:px-8 py-3 sm:py-4 text-sm sm:text-base');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/px-6 py-3/g, 'px-4 sm:px-6 py-2.5 sm:py-3 text-sm sm:text-base');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/p-4 rounded-full/g, 'p-3 sm:p-4 rounded-full');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/w-16 h-16/g, 'w-12 h-12 sm:w-16 sm:h-16');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/text-4xl/g, 'text-2xl sm:text-3xl md:text-4xl');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/text-3xl/g, 'text-xl sm:text-2xl md:text-3xl');
replace-colors.ts:    content = content.replace(/text-lg font-bold/g, 'text-base sm:text-lg font-bold');
replace-colors.ts:
replace-colors.ts:    if (content !== original) {
replace-colors.ts:      fs.writeFileSync(filepath, content, 'utf8');
replace-colors.ts:      console.log('Updated ' + filepath);
replace-colors.ts:    }
replace-colors.ts:  }
replace-colors.ts:});

public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:    <script>
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:        const loadItems = ['E/Saver', 'Tube Light', 'Fan', 'TV', 'Computer', 'Refrigerator', 'Freezer', 'W/Machine', 'Water Pump', 'Iron', 'UPS', 'Toka/Heater'];
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:        let detectionMonthsList = [];
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:        
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:        // Initialize dynamic inputs
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:        function initDynamicInputs() {
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:            // Load Inputs
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:            let loadHtml = '';
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:            loadItems.forEach((item, i) => {
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:                loadHtml += `<div class="form-row" style="align-items: flex-end;">
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:                    <div class="form-group" style="flex: 2;"><label>${item}</label><input type="hidden" id="l_${i}_desc" value="${item}"></div>
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:                    <div class="form-group"><label>Qty</label><input type="text" id="l_${i}_qty" oninput="updateLoad()"></div>
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:                    <div class="form-group"><label>Watts</label><input type="text" id="l_${i}_watts" oninput="updateLoad()"></div>
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:                    <div class="form-group"><label>Total</label><input type="text" id="l_${i}_total" oninput="updateLoad()"></div>
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:                </div>`;
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:            });
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:            document.getElementById('loadInputs').innerHTML = loadHtml;

public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:            if (!yyyyMm) return '';
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:            const [year, month] = yyyMm.split('-');
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:            const monthNames = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May', 'Jun', 'Jul', 'Aug', 'Sep', 'Oct', 'Nov', 'Dec'];
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:            return `${monthNames[parseInt(month) - 1]} ${year}`;
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:        }

public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:                    return JSON.stringify(obj);
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:                } catch (e) {

public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:                            if (cache.has(value)) return '[Circular]';
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:                            cache.add(value);
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:                        }
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:                        return value;
public/detection-bill-quick-fill.html:                    });

server.ts:  function getRobustErrorMessage(error: any): string {
server.ts:    console.error("Gemini API Error details:", error);
server.ts:    let errorMsg = "";
server.ts:    if (typeof error === 'string') {
server.ts:      errorMsg = error;
server.ts:    } else if (error && typeof error === 'object') {
server.ts:      errorMsg = error.message || error.statusText || "";
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (error.status) {
server.ts:        errorMsg += ` Status: ${error.status}`;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      if (error.error?.message) {
server.ts:        errorMsg += ` Details: ${error.error.message}`;
server.ts:      } else if (error.error?.details) {
server.ts:        errorMsg += ` Details: ${JSON.stringify(error.error.details)}`;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (!errorMsg) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:          errorMsg = JSON.stringify(error);
server.ts:        } catch (_) {
server.ts:          errorMsg = String(error);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    } else {
server.ts:      errorMsg = String(error);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    const errorLower = errorMsg.toLowerCase();
server.ts:    const isQuota = errorLower.includes('429') || 
server.ts:                    errorLower.includes('resource_exhausted') || 
server.ts:                    errorLower.includes('quota') || 
server.ts:                    errorLower.includes('rate limit') || 
server.ts:                    errorLower.includes('exceeded limit') || 
server.ts:                    errorLower.includes('limit exceeded');
server.ts:                    
server.ts:    const isInvalidKey = errorLower.includes('api key not valid') || 
server.ts:                         errorLower.includes('invalid api key') || 
server.ts:                         errorLower.includes('key not found') ||
server.ts:                         errorLower.includes('api_key_invalid') ||
server.ts:                         errorLower.includes('invalid_api_key');
server.ts:                         
server.ts:    const isUnavailable = errorLower.includes('503') || 
server.ts:                          errorLower.includes('unavailable') || 
server.ts:                          errorLower.includes('high demand') || 
server.ts:                          errorLower.includes('capacity') ||
server.ts:                          errorLower.includes('busy') ||
server.ts:                          errorLower.includes('overloaded');
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (isInvalidKey) {
server.ts:      return 'Invalid Gemini API Key. Please update your API Key in the AI Studio platform or Vercel Environment Variables.';
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (isQuota) {
server.ts:      return 'Gemini API Free Tier quota exceeded limit. Please wait and try again, or use the official LESCO fallback portal.';
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (isUnavailable) {
server.ts:      return 'Google AI service is currently experiencing high demand and is unavailable. Please try again later, or use the official LESCO fallback portal.';
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (errorMsg && errorMsg.includes('{') && errorMsg.includes('}')) {
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        const jsonStart = errorMsg.indexOf('{');
server.ts:        const parsed = JSON.parse(errorMsg.substring(jsonStart));
server.ts:        if (parsed.error?.message) {
server.ts:          errorMsg = parsed.error.message;
server.ts:        } else if (parsed.message) {
server.ts:          errorMsg = parsed.message;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      } catch (_) {}
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    if (errorMsg.startsWith('{"error"')) {
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        const p = JSON.parse(errorMsg);
server.ts:        if (p.error?.message) {
server.ts:          errorMsg = p.error.message;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      } catch(_) {}
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    return errorMsg || 'An unexpected error occurred during AI analysis. Please try again.';
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  function cleanAndParseJSON(text: string) {
server.ts:    const cleanText = text.trim();
server.ts:    if (!cleanText || cleanText === 'undefined') {
server.ts:      throw new Error("Empty response from AI");
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    // Try direct parsing first
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      return JSON.parse(cleanText);
server.ts:    } catch (err) {
server.ts:      // If direct parse fails, find boundaries of JSON object or array
server.ts:      const startObj = cleanText.indexOf('{');
server.ts:      const startArr = cleanText.indexOf('[');
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (startObj !== -1 || startArr !== -1) {
server.ts:        const isObject = startObj !== -1 && (startArr === -1 || startObj < startArr);
server.ts:        const startIdx = isObject ? startObj : startArr;
server.ts:        const endToken = isObject ? '}' : ']';
server.ts:        const endIdx = cleanText.lastIndexOf(endToken);
server.ts:        
server.ts:        if (endIdx !== -1 && endIdx > startIdx) {
server.ts:          const potentialJson = cleanText.substring(startIdx, endIdx + 1);
server.ts:          try {
server.ts:            return JSON.parse(potentialJson);
server.ts:          } catch (subErr) {
server.ts:            console.error("Sub-parsing of extracted JSON block failed. Raw potential content:", potentialJson);
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      // Last ditch fallback: strip any Markdown codes and try once more
server.ts:      let cleaned = cleanText
server.ts:        .replace(/^```json/gi, '')
server.ts:        .replace(/^```/g, '')
server.ts:        .replace(/```$/g, '')
server.ts:        .trim();
server.ts:      return JSON.parse(cleaned);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  // GEMINI ROUTES
server.ts:  app.post("/api/extract-bill", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      console.log(`[extract-bill] type of req.body: ${typeof req.body}, isArray: ${Array.isArray(req.body)}`);
server.ts:      if (req.body) {
server.ts:        console.log(`[extract-bill] req.body keys: ${Object.keys(req.body).join(", ")}`);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      const { base64Data, image, model: requestedModel = "gemini-3.5-flash" } = req.body || {};
server.ts:      const imgData = image || base64Data;
server.ts:      if (!imgData) {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ error: `Missing image data. Body keys: ${req.body ? Object.keys(req.body).join(", ") : 'none'}` });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const modelName = requestedModel === "gemini-flash-latest" || requestedModel === "gemini-1.5-flash" ? "gemini-3.5-flash" : requestedModel;
server.ts:      const ai = getAI();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      console.log(`Analyzing bill using model: ${modelName}, data length: ${imgData.length}`);
server.ts:
server.ts:      const result = await ai.models.generateContent({
server.ts:        model: modelName,
server.ts:        contents: [
server.ts:          {
server.ts:            role: "user",
server.ts:            parts: [
server.ts:              { inlineData: { mimeType: "image/jpeg", data: imgData } },
server.ts:              { text: `Extract all electricity bill details from this image into a JSON object.
server.ts:          
server.ts:=== IMPORTANT: ACCURACY ===
server.ts:- DO NOT hallucinate values. If a number is unclear or NOT VISIBLE in the screenshot, use an empty string "" instead of "N/A" where possible, especially for numeric fields.
server.ts:- DO NOT repeat values (like "55") across months if they are different on the bill.
server.ts:- For historical tables, extract EXACTLY what is written in each row.
server.ts:- Ensure the 'Month' and 'Year' match the table rows precisely (e.g., "MAR 25").
server.ts:- SPECIFIC GUARD: The status code "SS" (Status Same) is frequently misread as "55". If you see "SS" or something looking like "55" in a column where it could be a status code (like Units or Reading), verify carefully. If it is a status code, output "SS".
server.ts:- DO NOT fill in months that are not present in the image table. If only 10 months are visible, output only those 10 months.
server.ts:
server.ts:=== MONTH WISE UNITS TABLE (CONSUMPTION DATA) ===
server.ts:- If a value in the table is "N/A", empty, or unclear, use an empty string "" for that specific field (units, bill, adj, or payment). 
server.ts:- DO NOT combine multiple fields into one. Each field must be its own value in the object.
server.ts:- If a row is partially unreadable, still extract the readable parts (like Month and Units).
server.ts:
server.ts:=== FIELDS TO EXTRACT ===
server.ts:- referenceNumber: exact 14 digits
server.ts:- consumerName: full name
server.ts:- address: full address
server.ts:- sanctionedLoad: e.g., "1.00 kW"
server.ts:- customerId: e.g., "01-12345-6789123"
server.ts:- tariff: e.g., "A-1a(01)"
server.ts:- billingMonth: month and year, e.g., "MAR 26"
server.ts:- consumedUnits: Total units consumed this month
server.ts:- currentBill: monthly bill amount
server.ts:- deferredAmount: deferred amount if any
server.ts:- presentReading: latest index reading
server.ts:- previousReading: previous index reading
server.ts:- meterNoOnBill: meter serial number
server.ts:- subDivisionName: e.g., "FATEH SHER"
server.ts:- feederName: e.g., "CIVIL LINES"
server.ts:- meterStatus: e.g., "NORMAL"
server.ts:- monthWiseUnits: Array of { month, reading, units, bill, adj, payment }
server.ts:  (Extract from the consumption history table. Usually 12-13 months are visible.
server.ts:   Columns are usually: Month, Units, Bill, Adj, Payment/Balance.
server.ts:   If 'DF', 'SS', or 'Est. Def.' is present with a value, include it, e.g., "DF 81").
server.ts:
server.ts:=== RESPONSE ===
server.ts:Return ONLY JSON.` }
server.ts:            ]
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        ],
server.ts:        config: {
server.ts:          responseMimeType: "application/json",
server.ts:          responseSchema: {
server.ts:            type: Type.OBJECT,
server.ts:            properties: {
server.ts:              referenceNumber: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              consumerName: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              address: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              sanctionedLoad: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              customerId: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              tariff: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              billingMonth: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              consumedUnits: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              currentBill: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              deferredAmount: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              presentReading: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              previousReading: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              meterNoOnBill: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              subDivisionName: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              feederName: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              meterStatus: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:              monthWiseUnits: {
server.ts:                type: Type.ARRAY,
server.ts:                items: {
server.ts:                  type: Type.OBJECT,
server.ts:                  properties: {
server.ts:                    month: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:                    reading: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:                    units: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:                    bill: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:                    adj: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:                    payment: { type: Type.STRING },
server.ts:                  }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:              }
server.ts:            },
server.ts:            required: ["referenceNumber", "consumerName"],
server.ts:          },
server.ts:        },
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      const cleanText = (result.text || '').trim();
server.ts:      if (!cleanText || cleanText === 'undefined') throw new Error("The AI model returned an empty response. Please try a clearer picture.");
server.ts:      
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        const parsed = cleanAndParseJSON(cleanText);
server.ts:        res.json(parsed);
server.ts:      } catch (parseErr: any) {
server.ts:        console.error("JSON Parse Error on text:", cleanText, parseErr);
server.ts:        res.status(500).json({ 
server.ts:          error: "The AI returned data in an invalid format.", 
server.ts:          raw: cleanText.substring(0, 500) 
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Extraction error:", e);
server.ts:      let errorMsg = e.message;
server.ts:      if (e.message?.includes('API key not valid')) {
server.ts:        errorMsg = 'Invalid Gemini API Key. Please update your API Key in the AI Studio platform or Vercel Environment Variables.';
server.ts:      } else if (e.message?.includes('429') || e.message?.includes('RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED') || e.message?.includes('quota')) {
server.ts:        errorMsg = 'Gemini API Free Tier quota exceeded limit. Please wait and try again, or use the official LESCO fallback portal.';
server.ts:      } else if (e.message?.includes('503') || e.message?.includes('UNAVAILABLE') || e.message?.includes('high demand')) {
server.ts:        errorMsg = 'Google AI service is currently experiencing high demand. Please try again later, or use the official LESCO fallback portal.';
server.ts:      } else if (errorMsg && errorMsg.includes('{') && errorMsg.includes('}')) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:          const jsonStart = errorMsg.indexOf('{');
server.ts:          const jsonStr = errorMsg.substring(jsonStart);
server.ts:          const parsed = JSON.parse(jsonStr);
server.ts:          if (parsed.error?.message) {
server.ts:            errorMsg = parsed.error.message;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        } catch (_) {}
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: errorMsg });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:  // Upload Proxy Route
server.ts:  app.post("/api/upload", upload.single('file'), async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const bucket = getBucket();
server.ts:    if (!bucket) {
server.ts:      return res.status(500).json({ error: "Firebase Admin not initialized. Upload unavailable." });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (!req.file) {
server.ts:      return res.status(400).json({ error: "No file uploaded" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    const { template } = req.body;
server.ts:    const file = req.file;
server.ts:    const blob = bucket.file(`templates/${template}`);
server.ts:    const blobStream = blob.createWriteStream({
server.ts:      metadata: { contentType: file.mimetype }
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    blobStream.on('error', (err: any) => {
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: err.message });
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    blobStream.on('finish', async () => {
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        const publicUrl = await blob.getSignedUrl({
server.ts:          action: 'read',
server.ts:          expires: '03-01-2500'
server.ts:        });
server.ts:        res.status(200).json({ url: publicUrl[0] });
server.ts:      } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:        res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to generate signed URL: " + err.message });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    blobStream.end(file.buffer);
server.ts:  });

server.ts:  // Google Sheets Helper
server.ts:  async function getSheetsClient() {
server.ts:    const email = process.env.GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_EMAIL;
server.ts:    const key = process.env.GOOGLE_PRIVATE_KEY?.replace(/\\n/g, "\n");
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (!email || !key) {
server.ts:      throw new Error("Google Sheets credentials are not configured.");
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    const auth = new google.auth.JWT({
server.ts:      email,
server.ts:      key,
server.ts:      scopes: ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets"]
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    return google.sheets({ version: "v4", auth });
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.post("/api/save-to-sheets", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const spreadsheetId = process.env.GOOGLE_SHEETS_ID;
server.ts:      if (!spreadsheetId) {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ error: "GOOGLE_SHEETS_ID is not configured." });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const { data } = req.body;
server.ts:      if (!data) {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ error: "No data provided to save." });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const sheets = await getSheetsClient();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      // Prepare row data - flatten the case object into an array
server.ts:      // Order: Timestamp, Ref #, Name, Address, Billing Month, Units, Bill Amount, Sanctioned Load, Status
server.ts:      const row = [
server.ts:        new Date().toLocaleString(),
server.ts:        data.referenceNumber || "N/A",
server.ts:        data.consumerName || "N/A",
server.ts:        data.address || "N/A",
server.ts:        data.billingMonth || "N/A",
server.ts:        data.consumedUnits || "0",
server.ts:        data.currentBill || "0",
server.ts:        data.sanctionedLoad || "N/A",
server.ts:        data.meterStatus || "NORMAL"
server.ts:      ];
server.ts:
server.ts:      await sheets.spreadsheets.values.append({
server.ts:        spreadsheetId,
server.ts:        range: "Sheet1!A:I", // Appends to the first sheet
server.ts:        valueInputOption: "USER_ENTERED",
server.ts:        requestBody: {
server.ts:          values: [row],
server.ts:        },
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true, message: "Data saved to Google Sheets successfully." });
server.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Sheets Error:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || "Failed to save to Google Sheets." });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:  // Webhook for Google Sheets Auto-Sync of Approved Users (URDU: منظور شدہ صارفین کو خودکار منتقل کرنا)
server.ts:  app.post("/api/approve-user", express.json(), async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { 
server.ts:        email, 
server.ts:        name, 
server.ts:        subDivision, 
server.ts:        designation, 
server.ts:        sdoName, 
server.ts:        sdoNameUrdu, 
server.ts:        sdoCnic, 
server.ts:        sdoMobile, 
server.ts:        userMobile,
server.ts:        policeStations, 
server.ts:        policeStationsUrdu, 
server.ts:        isAllowed 
server.ts:      } = req.body;
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (!email) {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: "email is required" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Check isAllowed, or if the payload contains an approved status trigger
server.ts:      const statusCheck = String(isAllowed || '').toLowerCase();
server.ts:      const approved = isAllowed === true || isAllowed === 1 || statusCheck === 'true' || statusCheck === 'allow' || statusCheck === 'yes' || statusCheck === 'approved' || statusCheck === 'y' || statusCheck === 'ok';
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (!approved) {
server.ts:        return res.json({ success: true, message: "User status is not approved, skipped auto-entry." });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (admin.apps.length === 0) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:          admin.initializeApp({
server.ts:            credential: admin.credential.applicationDefault()
server.ts:          });
server.ts:        } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:          console.error("Firebase Admin credentials fallback initialization failed in webhook endpoint:", e.message);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const cleanEmail = email.toLowerCase().trim();
server.ts:      const placeholderUid = `pre-${cleanEmail.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, '_')}`;
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const db = admin.firestore();
server.ts:      const usersColl = db.collection('users');
server.ts:      const userSnap = await usersColl.where('email', '==', cleanEmail).get();
server.ts:
server.ts:      const finalPSList = Array.isArray(policeStations) ? policeStations.map((val: any) => String(val || '').trim()) : [];
server.ts:      const finalPSUrduList = Array.isArray(policeStationsUrdu) ? policeStationsUrdu.map((val: any) => String(val || '').trim()) : [];
server.ts:
server.ts:      const updateFields: any = {
server.ts:        email: cleanEmail,
server.ts:        name: name || 'Form Submitter',
server.ts:        subDivision: subDivision || 'Gulberg',
server.ts:        role: 'user',
server.ts:        disabled: false,
server.ts:        sdoName: sdoName || name || '',
server.ts:        sdoNameUrdu: sdoNameUrdu || '',
server.ts:        designation: designation || 'SDO (Operation)',
server.ts:        sdoCnic: sdoCnic || '',
server.ts:        sdoMobile: sdoMobile || '',
server.ts:        userMobile: userMobile || '',
server.ts:        policeStation: finalPSList[0] || '',
server.ts:        policeStationUrdu: finalPSUrduList[0] || '',
server.ts:        policeStations: finalPSList,
server.ts:        policeStationsUrdu: finalPSUrduList,
server.ts:        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
server.ts:      };
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (userSnap.empty) {
server.ts:        updateFields.uid = placeholderUid;
server.ts:        updateFields.expiryDate = new Date(Date.now() + 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
server.ts:        await usersColl.doc(placeholderUid).set(updateFields, { merge: true });
server.ts:        console.log(`Auto-registered new approved user via webhook: ${cleanEmail}`);
server.ts:        return res.json({ success: true, message: `Successfully registered new pre-auth agent: ${cleanEmail}` });
server.ts:      } else {
server.ts:        const userDoc = userSnap.docs[0];
server.ts:        await usersColl.doc(userDoc.id).set({
server.ts:          ...updateFields,
server.ts:          subDivision: subDivision || userDoc.data().subDivision || 'Gulberg'
server.ts:        }, { merge: true });
server.ts:        console.log(`Auto-updated profile entries for active user via webhook: ${cleanEmail}`);
server.ts:        return res.json({ success: true, message: `Successfully synchronized existing agent: ${cleanEmail}` });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Auto approval sync error:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: error.message || "Failed to sync approved agent" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Real LESCO Bill Scraping Endpoint
server.ts:  app.post("/api/fetch-bill", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { referenceNumber } = req.body;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    if (!referenceNumber) {
server.ts:      return res.status(400).json({ error: "Reference Number is required" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Clean reference number (remove spaces/hyphens)
server.ts:    const cleanRef = referenceNumber.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');

server.ts:

server.ts:      let lastError = "";
server.ts:
server.ts:      const userAgents = [
server.ts:        'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36',

server.ts:        'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:124.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/124.0'
server.ts:      ];
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Try fetching from all URLs in parallel with staggered starts
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        console.log(`Starting parallel fetch for reference: ${cleanRef} with ${uniqueUrls.length} mirrors`);
server.ts:        
server.ts:        const agent = new https.Agent({
server.ts:          // rejectUnauthorized: false - removed for security
server.ts:        });
server.ts:
server.ts:        response = await Promise.any(uniqueUrls.map(async (url, index) => {
server.ts:          let attempts = 0;
server.ts:          const maxAttempts = 2; 
server.ts:          
server.ts:          // Add a small staggered delay for each mirror to avoid being flagged
server.ts:          await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, index * 200));
server.ts:
server.ts:          while (attempts < maxAttempts) {
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:              attempts++;
server.ts:              
server.ts:              const res = await axios.get(url, {
server.ts:                headers: {
server.ts:                  'User-Agent': userAgents[(index + attempts) % userAgents.length],
server.ts:                  'Accept': 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8',
server.ts:                  'Accept-Language': 'en-US,en;q=0.9',
server.ts:                  'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
server.ts:                  'Pragma': 'no-cache',
server.ts:                  'Connection': 'keep-alive',
server.ts:                },
server.ts:                httpsAgent: agent,
server.ts:                timeout: 30000 // Increased from 15s to 30s
server.ts:              });
server.ts:
server.ts:              const data = res.data.toString();
server.ts:
server.ts:              if (data.includes("Reference Number Not Found") || data.includes("Invalid Reference Number") || data.includes("Record Not Found") || data.includes("not found in our record")) {
server.ts:                throw new Error("Reference Number not found");
server.ts:              }
server.ts:
server.ts:              if (data.includes("busy") || data.includes("Too many requests") || data.includes("try again later") || data.includes("Service Unavailable") || data.includes("Server Error")) {
server.ts:                throw new Error("Portal is busy");
server.ts:              }
server.ts:
server.ts:              if (data.includes("Consumer Name") || data.includes("NAME & ADDRESS") || data.includes("Reference No") || data.includes("BILLING MONTH") || data.includes("LESCO BILL")) {
server.ts:                console.log(`Successfully fetched from: ${url} (Attempt ${attempts})`);
server.ts:                return res;
server.ts:              } else {
server.ts:                throw new Error("Invalid page content or portal busy");
server.ts:              }
server.ts:            } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:              if (attempts >= maxAttempts || err.message === "Reference Number not found") {
server.ts:                throw err;
server.ts:              }
server.ts:              // Wait a bit before retry
server.ts:              await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
server.ts:            }
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        }));
server.ts:      } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:        // Promise.any throws AggregateError if all fail
server.ts:        if (err.name === 'AggregateError') {
server.ts:          lastError = err.errors.map((e: any) => e.message).join(' | ');
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:          lastError = err.message || "All LESCO portals are currently unresponsive";
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        console.error(`All parallel fetches failed for ${cleanRef}: ${lastError}`);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (!response) {
server.ts:        const errorMsg = lastError.includes('timeout') 
server.ts:          ? "LESCO servers took too long to respond. This usually happens during peak hours. Please try again in a few minutes or enter details manually."
server.ts:          : `LESCO servers are currently unresponsive (${lastError}). Please enter details manually.`;
server.ts:        throw new Error(errorMsg);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const $ = cheerio.load(response.data);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      // Improved extraction logic for PITC/LESCO layout
server.ts:      const getTextByLabel = (label: string) => {
server.ts:        const lowerLabel = label.toLowerCase();
server.ts:        let val = "";
server.ts:        
server.ts:        $('*').each((i, el) => {
server.ts:          const text = $(el).text().trim().toLowerCase();
server.ts:          if (text === lowerLabel || text.startsWith(lowerLabel + ':') || text.startsWith(lowerLabel + ' :')) {
server.ts:            // Try next sibling
server.ts:            val = $(el).next().text().trim();
server.ts:            if (!val) {
server.ts:              // Try parent's last child
server.ts:              val = $(el).parent().children().last().text().trim();
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            // If the value is still the label or empty, try to find in the same row
server.ts:            if (!val || val.toLowerCase() === lowerLabel) {
server.ts:              val = $(el).closest('tr').find('td').last().text().trim();
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            if (val && val.toLowerCase() !== lowerLabel) return false; // break
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        });
server.ts:
server.ts:        // Fallback: search for label anywhere and get next text node
server.ts:        if (!val) {
server.ts:          $(`td:contains("${label}")`).each((i, el) => {
server.ts:            const nextText = $(el).next().text().trim();
server.ts:            if (nextText) {
server.ts:              val = nextText;
server.ts:              return false;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:          });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        return val;
server.ts:      };
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Specific logic for Name & Address which is often in a larger block
server.ts:      let consumerName = "";
server.ts:      let address = "";
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const nameAddrTd = $(`td:contains("NAME & ADDRESS"), td:contains("Name & Address")`).next('td');
server.ts:      if (nameAddrTd.length) {
server.ts:        const text = nameAddrTd.text().trim();
server.ts:        const parts = text.split('\n').map(p => p.trim()).filter(p => p);
server.ts:        consumerName = parts[0] || "";
server.ts:        address = parts.slice(1).join(', ') || "";
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (!consumerName) consumerName = getTextByLabel("NAME") || getTextByLabel("Consumer Name") || "Unknown Consumer";
server.ts:      if (!address) address = getTextByLabel("ADDRESS") || "Address not found";
server.ts:
server.ts:      const monthWiseUnits: { month: string, units: number, bill?: number, adj?: number, payment?: number }[] = [];
server.ts:      $('table').each((i, table) => {
server.ts:        const text = $(table).text().toUpperCase();
server.ts:        if (text.includes('MONTH') && text.includes('UNITS')) {
server.ts:          $(table).find('tr').each((j, tr) => {
server.ts:            const tds = $(tr).find('td');
server.ts:            // LESCO historical table usually has: Month, Units, Bill, Adj, Payment, Balance
server.ts:            if (tds.length >= 2) {
server.ts:              const month = $(tds[0]).text().trim();
server.ts:              const unitsText = $(tds[1]).text().replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
server.ts:              const units = parseInt(unitsText);
server.ts:              
server.ts:              if (month && month.length >= 3 && month.length <= 6 && !isNaN(units)) {
server.ts:                const entry: any = { month, units };
server.ts:                
server.ts:                if (tds.length >= 3) {
server.ts:                  const billText = $(tds[2]).text().replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
server.ts:                  if (billText) entry.bill = parseInt(billText);
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                if (tds.length >= 4) {
server.ts:                  const adjText = $(tds[3]).text().replace(/[^0-9-]/g, '');
server.ts:                  if (adjText) entry.adj = parseInt(adjText);
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                if (tds.length >= 5) {
server.ts:                  const paymentText = $(tds[4]).text().replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
server.ts:                  if (paymentText) entry.payment = parseInt(paymentText);
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                
server.ts:                if (monthWiseUnits.length < 24) { // Limit to 2 years of history
server.ts:                  monthWiseUnits.push(entry);
server.ts:                }
server.ts:              }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:          });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Sort by month if possible, or just keep as is
server.ts:      // LESCO tables are usually reverse chronological
server.ts:
server.ts:      const billData = {
server.ts:        consumerName: consumerName,
server.ts:        address: address,
server.ts:        referenceNumber: cleanRef,
server.ts:        unitsConsumed: parseInt((getTextByLabel("UNITS CONSUMED") || getTextByLabel("Units") || "0").replace(/[^0-9]/g, '')) || 0,
server.ts:        amountDue: parseFloat((getTextByLabel("TOTAL PAYABLE") || getTextByLabel("Payable") || "0").replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || 0,
server.ts:        billingMonth: getTextByLabel("BILLING MONTH") || getTextByLabel("Month") || "N/A",
server.ts:        sanctionedLoad: getTextByLabel("LOAD") || getTextByLabel("SANCTIONED LOAD") || getTextByLabel("SANC LOAD") || "N/A",
server.ts:        connectionType: getTextByLabel("TARIFF") || "N/A",
server.ts:        customerId: getTextByLabel("CONSUMER ID") || getTextByLabel("CUSTOMER ID") || getTextByLabel("CONS ID") || "N/A",
server.ts:        currentBill: parseFloat(getTextByLabel("CURRENT BILL").replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || 0,
server.ts:        deferredAmount: parseFloat(getTextByLabel("DEFERRED AMOUNT").replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || parseFloat(getTextByLabel("DEFERRED").replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || 0,
server.ts:        previousReading: getTextByLabel("PREVIOUS READING") || getTextByLabel("PREV RDG") || getTextByLabel("PREVIOUS") || "N/A",
server.ts:        meterNoOnBill: getTextByLabel("METER NO") || getTextByLabel("METER NUMBER") || "N/A",
server.ts:        feederName: getTextByLabel("FEEDER") || getTextByLabel("FEEDER NAME") || "N/A",
server.ts:        monthWiseUnitsConsumed: getTextByLabel("MONTH WISE UNITS CONSUMED") || "N/A",
server.ts:        monthWiseUnits: monthWiseUnits.length > 0 ? monthWiseUnits : undefined,
server.ts:      };
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Final check - if we got nothing, it's a failure
server.ts:      if (billData.consumerName === "Unknown" && billData.amountDue === 0) {
server.ts:        console.error("Scraping failed: No data extracted from portal");
server.ts:        throw new Error("Could not parse bill data. The portal structure might have changed.");
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      console.log(`Sending bill data for ref: ${cleanRef}, units: ${billData.monthWiseUnits?.length || 0}`);
server.ts:      res.json(billData);
server.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Scraping error:", error.message);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ 
server.ts:        error: error.message || "Failed to fetch actual bill data.",
server.ts:        details: error.stack
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:

server.ts:  if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") {
